---
title: "extract"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r package, include=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
library(plyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(data.table)
library(sjmisc)
library(janitor)
library(lubridate)
library(hms)
library(schoolmath)
library(stringi)
library(gdata)
```

```{r}
# everything in one

new = data.frame()

times <- c(76, 105, 125, 138, 140, 249, 740)

file_num = 0
for (i in 1:length(filepaths)) {
  
  data = read_excel_allsheets(filepaths[[i]])
  for (j in 1:length(data)) {
  new_i <- data.frame(data[j]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
  new_i <- new_i[!duplicated(colnames(new_i))]
  names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner" 
  if (!is.POSIXct(new_i$date)) {
    new_i$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
  }
  date <- new_i$date[1]
  group <- new_i$groups[1]
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  new <- bind_rows(new,new_i)
  
  }
  file_num = i
}
print (file_num)

```

filepath of files with mis-recorded value or multiple partners : 8, 17, 24, 36, 43, 67, 134, 158, 167, 174, 187, 190, 220, 312, 388, 389, 400, 665, 674f, 698f filepath of files with wrong date format: 76, 105, 125, 138, 140, 249, 740

```{r}
data = read_excel_allsheets(filepaths[[1]])
for (j in 1:length(data)) {
  new_i <- data.frame(data[j]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  if(nrow(new_i)!=0) {
  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
  new_i <- new_i[!duplicated(colnames(new_i))]
  names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner" 
  if (!is.POSIXct(new_i$date)) {
    new_i$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
  }
  date <- new_i$date[1]
  group <- new_i$groups[1]
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  new <- bind_rows(new,new_i)
  }
}
```

```{r}
# partner
partners <- data.frame()
# 1-100
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:100) {
  if (! i %in% c(36, 43, 134, 158, 174, 187, 190, 220, 312)) {
  data = read_excel_allsheets(filepaths[[i]])
  for (j in 1:length(data)) {
  new_i <- data.frame(data[j]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  if(dim(new_i)!=0) {
  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner" 
  if (!is.POSIXct(new_i$date)) {
    new_i$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
  }
  date <- new_i$date[3]
  group <- new_i$groups[3]
   
  if (!is.null(new_i$partner)) {
    
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(partner) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  }
  if(nrow(partners %>% filter(is.na(date)))==0){
    partners <- bind_rows(partners,new_i)
  } else {
    break
  }
  
  }
  }
  }
  
}


partners <- partners[1:3]
partners <- partners %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  right_join(partners %>% distinct(groups,partner))
partners <- bind_rows(partners,multipart)

# multipart <- multipart %>% 
#   filter(!is.na(partner))
# multi2 <- multipart %>% 
#   distinct(groups,partner)
# multi1 <- multipart %>% 
#   unique()
# partners1 <- partners %>% 
#   unique()
# partners2 <- partners %>% 
#   distinct(groups,partner)
```

```{r}
filepaths[740]

partners <- bind_rows(partners,ps)

```

```{r}
# data to append
partners_modify <- data.frame()


for (i in 1:length(filepaths)) {
  if (! i %in% c(36, 43, 134, 158, 174, 187, 190, 220, 312)) {
  data = read_excel_allsheets(filepaths[[i]])
  for (j in 1:length(data)) {
  new_i <- data.frame(data[j]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  if (nrow(new_i)!= 0) {
    names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
    names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
    names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner" 
    if (!is.POSIXct(new_i$date)) {
      new_i$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
    }
    date <- new_i$date[3]
    group <- new_i$groups[3]
  
       
     
    if (!is.null(new_i$partner)) {
      
    new_i<- new_i %>% 
      select(partner) %>% 
      filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
      mutate(date = date, groups = group)
    }
    
    if(nrow(partners_modify %>% filter(is.na(date)))==0){
      partners_modify <- bind_rows(partners_modify,new_i)
    } else {
      break
    }

  }
  }
  }
  
}
partners_modify %>% 
  filter(is.na(date))

partners_modify <- partners_modify[1:3]
partners_modify <- partners_modify %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  right_join(partners_modify %>% distinct(groups,partner))
partners_modify <- bind_rows(partners_modify,multipart)

nrow(unique(partners_modify))

partners_modify <- partners_modify %>% 
  filter(!is.na(partner)) %>% 
  unique()
```

```{r}
# add the earliest date per partner+group
partners1 <- partners1 %>%
  distinct() %>%
  right_join(partners1 %>% distinct(groups,partner))
```

```{r}
multi1 <- multipart %>%
  distinct() %>%
  right_join(multipart %>% distinct(groups,partner))
```

```{r}
multipart <- data.frame()
```

```{r}
# 24: messed
# 36(3)[just a "Cluster"], 43(3), 134(2), 158(2), 174(1), 187(4)[but just a "None"], 190(3) [just a "Cluster"], 312(4): safe to join
# 67(4), 220(3): second partner column might be duplicated with the first
for (i in 36:312) {
  if (i %in% c(36, 43, 134, 158, 174, 187, 190, 220, 312)) {
  data = read_excel_allsheets(filepaths[[i]])
  for (j in 1:length(data)) {
  new_i <- data.frame(data[j]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  if(dim(new_i)!=0) {
  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  parts <- new_i[ ,grepl( "partner" , names( new_i ) )]
  if (!is.POSIXct(new_i$date)) {
    new_i$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
  }
  

  date <- new_i$date[3]
  group <- new_i$groups[3]
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(contains("partner")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  if(length(parts)==2){
     new_i <- new_i %>% 
      mutate(partners = if_else(is.na(new_i[[1]]), new_i[[2]], new_i[[1]]))
     new_i <- new_i[-c(1,2)]
  } 
 
  
  multipart <- bind_rows(multipart,new_i)
  }
  }
  }
}

```

```{r}
# to combine two cols into one
# if one is NA, let partner equal to the other
for (i in  24:312) {
  if (i %in% c(24, 36, 43, 67, 134, 158, 174, 187, 190, 220, 312)) {
  data = read_excel_allsheets(filepaths[[i]])
  for (j in 1:length(data)) {
  new_i <- data.frame(data[j]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  if(dim(new_i)!=0) {
  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  parts <- new_i[ ,grepl( "partner" , names( new_i ) )]
  names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner" 
  if (!is.POSIXct(new_i$date)) {
    new_i$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
  }
  date <- new_i$date[3]
  group <- new_i$groups[3]
  
  if(length(parts)==2){
     new_i <- new_i %>% 
      mutate(partners = if_else(is.na(new_i[[1]]), new_i[[2]], new_i[[1]]))
     new_i <- new_i[-c(1,2)] %>% 
       select(partners) %>% 
       filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
       mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  } else{
  if (!is.null(new_i$partner)) {
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(partner) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  }
  multipart <- bind_rows(multipart,new_i)
  }
  }
}
}
}

multipart <- multipart[1:3]
multipart <- multipart %>% 
  filter(!is.na(partner))
multi2 <- multipart %>% 
  distinct(groups,partner)
multi1 <- multipart %>% 
  unique()

partners1 <- bind_rows(partners1,multi1)

```

```{r}
# to split cells with ; 
# s <- str_split(d$partner[i], ";")
# to append new rows with individual partner: for (j in 1:length(s[[1]])) { df <- df %>% add_row(groups = d$groups[i], date = d$date[i], partner = s[[1]][j])
partners <- partners %>% 
  filter(!is.na(partner))
partners1 <- partners[1:20,]
for (i in 1:nrow(partners1)) {
  if (str_detect(partners1$partner[i], ";")) {
    s <- str_split(partners1$partner[i], "; ")
    for (j in 1:length(s[[1]])) {
      partners1 <- partners1 %>% 
        add_row(groups = partners1$groups[i], 
                date = partners1$date[i], 
                partner = s[[1]][j])
    }
    partners1 <- partners1[-i,]
  }
  print(i)
}


partners2 <- partners1 %>% 
  arrange(date)
finalpartner <- data.frame()
finalpartner <- bind_rows(finalpartner, partners2)
finalpartner <- bind_rows(partners1, finalpartner)


for (i in 1:13) {
  if (str_detect(finalpartner$partner[i], ";")) {
    s <- str_split(finalpartner$partner[i], "; ")
    for (j in 1:length(s[[1]])) {
      finalpartner <- finalpartner %>% 
        add_row(groups = finalpartner$groups[i], 
                date = finalpartner$date[i], 
                partner = s[[1]][j])
    }
    finalpartner <- finalpartner[-i,]
  }
  print(i)
}

finalpartner <- finalpartner %>% 
  arrange(date)
```

```{r}
uniquepartner <- finalpartner %>% 
  distinct() %>%
  right_join(partners %>% distinct(groups,partner))
```

```{r}
partners_modify1 <- read_excel("/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/RAW\ Focal\ data\ copy/partners1.xlsx")
```

```{r}
# split rows until no multi-value partner
for (num in 1:20) {
  for (i in 1:nrow(partners_modify)) {
    if (str_detect(partners_modify$partner[i], ";")) {
      s <- str_split(partners_modify$partner[i], ";")
      for (j in 1:length(s[[1]])) {
        partners_modify <- partners_modify %>% 
          add_row(groups = partners_modify$groups[i], 
                  date = partners_modify$date[i], 
                  partner = s[[1]][j])
      }
      partners_modify <- partners_modify[-i,]
    }
    print(i)
  }
}

```

```{r}
# check rows missed by for loop detection
partners_modify %>% 
  filter(grepl(";",partner))
```

```{r}
# check if na date
partners %>% 
  filter(is.na(date))
```

```{r}
# add replacement
partners_modify <- partners_modify %>% 
  mutate(replacement = "")
part <- partners_modify$partner
pcode <- gsub("[\\(\\)]",  "", regmatches(part, gregexpr("\\(.*?\\)", part)))
pcodes <- str_extract(part, "(?<=\\()([^()]*?)(?=\\)[^()]*$)")

for (i in 1:length(pcodes)) {
  char <- str_extract(pcodes[i], "[aA-zZ]+")
  if (substr(char,1,1) != "V" || 
      !substr(char,nchar(char), nchar(char)) %in% c("F","M") || 
      nchar(pcodes[i])-nchar(char)!=3) {
    pcodes[i] = NA
  }
}

partners_modify$replacement=pcodes
preplace <- partners_modify[,c(length(partners_modify), 1:(length(partners_modify)-1))] %>% 
  arrange(rowSums(!is.na(select(., "replacement")))) %>% 
  arrange(date)


```

```{r}
# split rows that was somehow missed
for (i in 1:nrow(preplace)) {
  if (str_detect(preplace$partner[i], ";")) {
    s <- str_split(preplace$partner[i], "; ")
    for (j in 1:length(s[[1]])) {
      preplace <- preplace %>% 
        add_row(groups = preplace$groups[i], 
                date = preplace$date[i], 
                partner = s[[1]][j])
    }
    preplace <- preplace[-i,]
  }
  print(i)
}
```

```{r}
data = read_excel_allsheets(filepaths[[67]])
  for (j in 1:length(data)) {
  if(j!=4){
  new_i <- data.frame(data[j]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  if(dim(new_i)!=0) {
  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner" 
  if (!is.POSIXct(new_i$date)) {
    new_i$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
  }
  date <- new_i$date[3]
  group <- new_i$groups[3]
  if (!is.null(new_i$partner)) {
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(partner) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  multipart <- bind_rows(multipart,new_i)
  }
  }
  }}
print(j)
```

```{r}
p <- data.frame(data[3]) %>% 
  select(where(no_na)) %>% 
  clean_names()
p %>% 
  filter(!is.na())
```

```{r}
# focal individual, date, and group
focals <- data.frame()
```

```{r}

# Skipped:
#1/18/12 sheet 4 really messed, path 24 (moved to 01-17-12)
#2/13/12 important note, path 128 (deleted that part)
#path 131 important notes for data modification (comments deleted)
#path 134 j = 2 two focal individuals (cleaned)
#path167 j = 4 two focal individuals (modified partner)
# "?" - 2013.12.3 sheet3 (inserted group name)
for (i in (1:length(filepaths))) {
  data = read_excel_allsheets(filepaths[[i]])
  for (j in 1:length(data)) {
  new_i <- data.frame(data[j]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  
  if(nrow(new_i)!=0) {
  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
  new_i <- new_i %>% 
    filter(is.na(as.numeric(focal_individual))) %>% 
    select(where(no_na))
  
  date <- new_i$date[1]
  group <- new_i$groups[1]
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(focal_individual) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  
  if (!is.POSIXct(new_i$date)) {
    new_i$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
  }
  
  focals <- bind_rows(focals,new_i) %>% 
    unique()
  }
  }
}
```

```{r}
# add replacement
replace <- focals %>% 
  mutate(replacement = "")
individual <- focals$focal_individual
code <- gsub("[\\(\\)]",  "", regmatches(individual, gregexpr("\\(.*?\\)", individual)))
codes <- str_extract(individual, "(?<=\\()([^()]*?)(?=\\)[^()]*$)")

for (i in 1:length(codes)) {
  char <- str_extract(codes[i], "[aA-zZ]+")
  if (substr(char,1,1) != "V" || 
      !substr(char,nchar(char), nchar(char)) %in% c("F","M") || 
      nchar(codes[i])-nchar(char)!=3) {
    codes[i] = NA
  }
}

replace$replacement = codes
freplace <- replace[,c(length(replace), 1:(length(replace)-1))] %>% 
  arrange(rowSums(!is.na(select_(., "replacement")))) %>% 
  arrange(date)
dreplace <- replace[,c(length(replace), 1:(length(replace)-1))] %>% 
  arrange(date)
na1 <- freplace %>%
  filter(is.na(replacement)) %>%
  arrange(date)
na <- na %>%
  arrange(date)
nap <- preplace %>%
  filter(is.na(replacement))
```

In the 'Time' column of 2013-04-20 sheet 1 row 79, 2013-04-22 sheet 1 row 42, 2013-04-23 sheet 2 the last row, 2013-06-06 sheet 1 the last row, 2013-06-29 sheet 3 row 245, and 2014-02-07 sheet 2 row 28, there is a character string instead of a real time recorded.

```{r}
# start focal
# Time:(i = 443, j = 1); (445, 1); 508,3; 725,2
# 446,2; 514,1 (last row); 
# 456,3 (duplicate Time first row), deleted; 
# 542,1; 798,2; 808,1(seems fine)
meta <- data.frame()
month <- c("January", "February", "March")
month = paste(month, collapse="|")
with_obsv <- filepaths[!grepl("2011",filepaths) & !(grepl("2012",filepaths) & grepl(month, filepaths))]

no_obsv <- setdiff(filepaths, with_obsv)


for (i in 798:length(with_obsv)) {
  if (!(i %in% c(541, 797, 807))) {
    data = read_excel_allsheets(with_obsv[[i]])
    for (j in 1:length(data)) {
      new_i <- data.frame(data[[j]]) %>% 
        select(where(no_na)) %>% 
        clean_names()
      
      if(nrow(new_i)!= 0) {
        names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
        names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
        names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
        names(new_i)[grepl("behavior", names(new_i))] <- "behavior"
        names(new_i)[grepl("observ", names(new_i))] <- "observer"
        
        new_i <- filter(new_i, grepl("start focal", tolower(behavior)))
          # filter(is.na(as.numeric(focal_individual))) %>% 
        new_i <- select(new_i, where(no_na))
        
        names(new_i)[grepl("time", names(new_i))] <- "St.Time"
        for (k in 1:nrow(new_i)) {
          if (grepl("AM|PM", new_i$St.Time[k])) 
            new_i$St.Time[k] = as_hms(parse_date_time(new_i$St.Time[k], '%I:%M:%S %p'))
          else
            new_i$St.Time[k] = as_hms(new_i$St.Time[k])
        }
        
        date <- new_i$date[1]
        group <- new_i$groups[1]
        new_i<- new_i %>% 
          select(focal_individual, St.Time, observer, behavior) %>% 
          filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
          mutate(date = date, groups = group, file = i, sheet = j)
        
        if (!is.POSIXct(new_i$date)) {
          new_i$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
        }
        
        meta <- bind_rows(meta, new_i)
      }
    }
  }
  print(i)
}
```

```{r}
examine <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:3) {
  if (!(i %in% c(542, 798, 808))) {
    data = read_excel_allsheets(with_obsv[[i]])
    for (j in 1:length(data)) {
      new_i <- data.frame(data[j]) %>% 
        select(where(no_na)) %>% 
        clean_names()
      
      if(nrow(new_i)!= 0) {
        names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
        names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
        names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
        names(new_i)[grepl("behavior", names(new_i))] <- "behavior"
        names(new_i)[grepl("observ", names(new_i))] <- "observer"
        
        new_i <- filter(new_i, grepl("start focal", tolower(behavior)))
          # filter(is.na(as.numeric(focal_individual))) %>% 
        new_i <- select(new_i, where(no_na))
        
        names(new_i)[grepl("time", names(new_i))] <- "St.Time"
        for (k in 1:nrow(new_i)) {
          if (grepl("AM|PM", new_i$St.Time[k])) 
            new_i$St.Time[k] = as_hms(parse_date_time(new_i$St.Time[k], '%I:%M:%S %p'))
          else
            new_i$St.Time[k] = as_hms(new_i$St.Time[k])
        }
        
        date <- new_i$date[1]
        group <- new_i$groups[1]
        new_i<- new_i %>% 
          select(focal_individual, St.Time, observer, behavior) %>% 
          filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
          mutate(date = date, groups = group, file = i, sheet = j)
        
        if (!is.POSIXct(new_i$date)) {
          new_i$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
        }
        
        examine <- bind_rows(examine,new_i)
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
data = read_excel_allsheets(with_obsv[[90]])
meta1 <- data.frame()
  for (j in 2) {
    new_i <- data.frame(data[j]) %>% 
      select(where(no_na)) %>% 
      clean_names()
    
    if(nrow(new_i)!= 0) {
      names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
      names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
      names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
      names(new_i)[grepl("behavior", names(new_i))] <- "behavior"
      names(new_i)[grepl("observ", names(new_i))] <- "observer"
      
      new_i <- filter(new_i, grepl("start focal", tolower(behavior)))
        # filter(is.na(as.numeric(focal_individual))) %>% 
      new_i <- select(new_i, where(no_na))
      
      names(new_i)[grepl("time", names(new_i))] <- "St.Time"
    
      new_i$St.Time = as_hms(new_i$St.Time)

      
      date <- new_i$date[1]
      group <- new_i$groups[1]
      new_i<- new_i %>% 
        select(focal_individual, St.Time, observer, behavior) %>% 
        filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
        mutate(date = date, groups = group, file = i, sheet = j)
      
      if (!is.POSIXct(new_i$date)) {
        new_i$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
      }
      
      meta1 <- bind_rows(meta1,new_i)
    }
  }
  
```

```{r}
part18 <- part18 %>% 
  unique() %>% 
  mutate(location = NA)

for (i in 1:nrow(part18)) {
  if (grepl("burrow", tolower(part18$focal_individual[i])))
    part18$location[i] = "burrow"
  else if (grepl("forage", tolower(part18$focal_individual[i])))
    part18$location[i] = "forage"
  else if (grepl("Lactation", part18$focal_individual[i]))
    part18$location[i] = "lactation"
}

meta_no1 <- meta_no_obs %>% 
  unique()
meta_no1$location = NA

meta_naloc <- meta2 %>% 
  filter(is.na(location))

for (i in 1:nrow(meta_no1)) {
  if (grepl("burrow", tolower(meta_no1$focal_individual[i])))
    meta_no1$location[i] = "burrow"
  else if (grepl("forage", tolower(meta_no1$focal_individual[i])))
    meta_no1$location[i] = "forage"
  else if (grepl("Lactation", meta_no1$focal_individual[i]))
    meta_no1$location[i] = "lactation"
}



for (i in 2:(nrow(part18)-1)) {
  if (is.na(part18$location[i])){
    if (!is.na(part18$location[i-1]) & !is.na(part18$location[i+1])) {
      if (part18$focal_individual[i-1]==part18$focal_individual[i+1] & 
        part18$location[i-1]==part18$location[i+1] & 
          part18$groups[i-1] == part18$groups[i+ 1])
        part18$location[i] = part18$location[i-1]
    }
  }
}


for (i in 2:(nrow(meta_no1)-1)) {
  if (is.na(meta_no1$location[i])){
    if (!is.na(meta_no1$location[i-1]) & !is.na(meta_no1$location[i+1])) {
      if (meta_no1$location[i-1]==meta_no1$location[i+1] & 
          meta_no1$groups[i-1] == meta_no1$groups[i+ 1])
        meta_no1$location[i] = meta_no1$location[i-1]
    }
  }
} # imputed 3 entries

meta_naloc11 <- meta_no1 %>% 
  filter(is.na(location)) 


meta3 <- meta2 %>% 
  select(-behavior) %>% 
  mutate(St.Time = as_hms(St.Time)) %>% 
  arrange(date, St.Time)

meta_no2 <- meta_no1 %>% 
  select(-behavior) %>% 
  mutate(St.Time = as_hms(St.Time)) %>% 
  arrange(date, St.Time)

```

```{r location}
# replace using dictionary, then location&gsub
part18 <- part18 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = gsub("burrow |burrow;|burrow; |burrow, |burrow, |burrow:|forage|forage |forage;|forage; |forage: |forage, ", "", focal_individual))

par2_3 <- par2_3 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = gsub("burrow |burrow;|burrow; |burrow, |burrow, |burrow:|forage|forage |forage;|forage; |forage: |forage, ", "", focal_individual))

par2_2 <- par2_2 %>% 
  unique()

par2_3$location = NA
newpart12$location = NA

par2_3 <- par2_3 %>% 
  mutate(location = case_when(grepl("burrow", focal_individual) ~ "burrow",
                              grepl("forage", focal_individual) ~ "forage",
                              grepl("lactation", focal_individual) ~ "lactation",
                              TRUE ~ location))

newpart12 <- newpart12 %>% 
  mutate(location = case_when(grepl("burrow", focal_individual) ~ "burrow",
                              grepl("forage", focal_individual) ~ "forage",
                              grepl("lactation", focal_individual) ~ "lactation",
                              TRUE ~ location))
newpar11 <- newpar11 %>% 
  mutate(location = case_when(grepl("burrow", focal_individual) ~ "burrow",
                              grepl("forage", focal_individual) ~ "forage",
                              grepl("lactation", focal_individual) ~ "lactation",
                              TRUE ~ location))


meta_no3 <- meta_no2 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = gsub("Burrow |Burrow;|Burrow; |Burrow, |Burrow, |Burrow:|Forage|Forage |Forage;|Forage; |Forage: |Forage, ", "", focal_individual))


dictionary <- dictionary %>% 
  clean_names()
dict <- dictionary %>% 
  filter(replacement!="NA") %>% 
  distinct(focal_individual, groups, replacement)

dic <- dict %>% 
  distinct(focal_individual, groups, .keep_all = TRUE)

setdiff(dict,dic) 
multirep <- dict %>% 
  filter(focal_individual == "Burrow; RT (F194)" & groups == "Lazuli" | 
         focal_individual == "Forage; Little LT (VDP166)" & groups == "Drie Doring" |
         focal_individual == "Forage; RT (VCVP007)" & groups == "Cavemen")

meta_no4 <- merge(x = meta_no3, y = dic, by=c("focal_individual","groups"), all.x = TRUE)
newpart14 <- merge(x = newpart13, y = dic, by=c("focal_individual","groups"), all.x = TRUE)
meta5 <- merge(x = meta4, y = dic, by=c("focal_individual","groups"), all.x = TRUE)
newpar13 <- merge(x = newpar12, y = dic, by=c("focal_individual","groups"), all.x = TRUE)

newpart13 <- newpart12 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = gsub("burrow |burrow;|burrow; |burrow, |burrow, |burrow:|forage|forage |forage;|forage; |forage: |forage, ", "", focal_individual))
newpar12 <- newpar11 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = gsub("burrow |burrow;|burrow; |burrow, |burrow, |burrow:|forage|forage |forage;|forage; |forage: |forage, ", "", focal_individual))

meta6 <- meta5 %>% 
  select(date, St.Time, replacement, location, groups, observer, file, sheet) %>% 
  rename(focal_individual = replacement)

meta_no5 <- meta_no4 %>% 
  select(date, St.Time, replacement, location, groups, file, sheet) %>% 
  rename(focal_individual = replacement)


no_location <- meta6 %>% 
  filter(is.na(location)) 
  #filter(!(file == 43 & sheet == 2))

no_loc_noobs <- meta_no5 %>% 
  filter(is.na(location)) %>% 
  arrange(date, St.Time)

```

```{r}
# impute location with new dataset (2012.10.2)
loc <- read_excel("data/loc.xlsx")
loc1 <- loc %>% 
  rename(St.Time = st.time, loc = location) %>% 
  select(St.Time, date, loc)

loc2 <- loc1 %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date, format = "%m/%d/%y"),
         St.Time = as_hms(St.Time))
loc3 <- loc2 %>% 
  mutate(date = as.character(date),
         St.Time = as.character(St.Time))
subset3 <- subset2_1 %>% 
  mutate(date = as.character(date))
subset4 <- merge(x = subset3, y = loc3, by=c("date", "St.Time"), all.x = TRUE)
meta_no6 <- merge(x = meta_no5, y = loc2, by=c("date", "St.Time"), all.x = TRUE)
subset4 <- subset4 %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(is.na(location), loc, location))

subset4 <- subset4 %>% 
  select(-loc)

subset5 <- subset4

for (i in 2:(nrow(subset4)-1)) {
  if (is.na(subset4$location[i])){
    if (!is.na(subset4$location[i-1]) & !is.na(subset4$location[i+1])) {
      if (subset4$location[i-1]==subset4$location[i+1] & 
        subset4$date[i-1] == subset4$date[i+1] &
        subset4$groups[i-1] == subset4$groups[i+1])
          subset4$location[i] = subset4$location[i-1]
    }
  }
  print(i)
}

all3 <- all2_1 %>% 
  mutate(date = as.character(date))
all4 <- merge(x = all3, y = loc3, by=c("date", "St.Time"), all.x = TRUE)
all4 <- all4 %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(is.na(location), loc, location))

all4 <- all4 %>% 
  select(-loc)

all5 <- all4

for (i in 2:(nrow(all4)-1)) {
  if (is.na(all4$location[i])){
    if (!is.na(all4$location[i-1]) & !is.na(all4$location[i+1])) {
      if (all4$location[i-1]==all4$location[i+1] & 
        all4$date[i-1] == all4$date[i+1] &
        all4$groups[i-1] == all4$groups[i+1])
          all4$location[i] = all4$location[i-1]
    }
  }
  print(i)
}


meta_no7 <- meta_no6 %>% 
  unique() %>% 
  mutate(location = loc) %>% 
  select(-loc)

no_loc_noobs1 <- meta_no7 %>% 
  filter(is.na(location)) %>% 
  arrange(date, St.Time)
```

```{r}
moreloc <- read_excel("data/moreloc.xlsx")
moreloc1 <- moreloc %>% 
  rename(St.Time = st.time, loc = location) %>% 
  select(St.Time, date, loc)

moreloc2 <- moreloc1 %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date, format = "%m/%d/%y"),
         St.Time = as_hms(St.Time))

meta_no8 <- merge(x = meta_no7, y = moreloc2, by=c("date", "St.Time"), all.x = TRUE)

meta_no9 <- meta_no8 %>% 
  unique() %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(is.na(location), loc, location)) %>% 
  select(-loc)

no_loc_noobs2 <- meta_no9 %>% 
  filter(is.na(location)) %>% 
  arrange(date, St.Time)

# no more location added
```

```{r}
# add locations from new file to meta6
no_location1 <- merge(x = no_loc_afteradd, y = loc2, by=c("date", "St.Time"), all.x = TRUE)
no_location2 <- no_location1 %>% 
  select(date, St.Time, loc)
meta7 <- merge(x = meta6, y = no_location2, by=c("date", "St.Time"), all.x = TRUE)
meta8 <- meta7 %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(is.na(location), loc, location)) %>% 
  select(-loc)

# meta 8 and meta_no9 are the most updated data set

no_loc_afteradd1 <- meta8 %>% 
  filter(is.na(location))
```

```{r}
# miss location
no_location <- no_location %>% 
  arrange(date, St.Time)
```

```{r}
# impute location
add_loc <- read_excel("data/add_loc.xlsx")
add_loc <- add_loc %>% 
  filter(!is.na(location))
for (i in 1:nrow(meta6)) {
  if (is.na(meta6$location[i])) {
    for (j in 1:nrow(add_loc)) {
      if (meta6$date[i] == add_loc$date[j] & 
          as_hms(meta6$St.Time[i]) == as_hms(add_loc$St.Time[j])) {
        meta6$location[i] = add_loc$location[j]
      }
    }
  }
}

no_loc_afteradd <- meta6 %>% 
  filter(is.na(location))
```

```{r}
# for files with no observers
meta_no_obs <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(no_obsv)) {
  data = read_excel_allsheets(no_obsv[[i]])
  for (j in 1:length(data)) {
    new_i <- data.frame(data[j]) %>% 
      select(where(no_na)) %>% 
      clean_names()
    
    if(nrow(new_i)!= 0) {
      names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
      names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
      names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
      names(new_i)[grepl("behavior", names(new_i))] <- "behavior"
      
      new_i <- filter(new_i, grepl("start focal", tolower(behavior)))
        # filter(is.na(as.numeric(focal_individual))) %>% 
      new_i <- select(new_i, where(no_na))
      
      names(new_i)[grepl("time", names(new_i))] <- "St.Time"
      for (k in 1:nrow(new_i)) {
        if (grepl("AM|PM", new_i$St.Time[k])) 
          new_i$St.Time[k] = as_hms(parse_date_time(new_i$St.Time[k], '%I:%M:%S %p'))
        else
          new_i$St.Time[k] = as_hms(new_i$St.Time[k])
      }
      
      date <- new_i$date[1]
      group <- new_i$groups[1]
      new_i<- new_i %>% 
        select(focal_individual, St.Time, behavior) %>% 
        filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
        mutate(date = date, groups = group, file = i, sheet = j)
      
      if (!is.POSIXct(new_i$date)) {
        new_i$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
      }
      
      meta_no_obs <- bind_rows(meta_no_obs,new_i)
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
data = read_excel_allsheets(no_obsv[[14]])
data = read_excel_allsheets(no_obsv[[meta_add_obs$file[14]]])
  sheet = toupper(names(data[meta_add_obs$sheet[14]]))
  if (grepl(Obs, sheet)) {
    print("1")
  }
```

```{r observer}
# add observer
# not in the observer code file: LAUR/Lauren; LG; LEW
obs <- read_excel("data/obs.xlsx")
Obs <- obs$code
Ob <- paste(Obs, collapse="|")

meta_add_obs <- meta_no9 %>% 
  mutate(observer = NA)

for (i in 1:nrow(meta_add_obs)) {
  data = read_excel_allsheets(no_obsv[[meta_add_obs$file[i]]])
  sheet = toupper(names(data[meta_add_obs$sheet[i]]))
  if (grepl(Ob, sheet)) {
    meta_add_obs$observer[i] = str_extract(sheet, Ob)
  }
}
newpar12 <- newpar11 %>% 
  mutate(file = as.numeric(file), sheet = as.numeric(sheet))
for (i in 1:nrow(newpar12)) {
  data = read_excel_allsheets(no_obsv[[newpar12$file[i]]])
  sheet = toupper(names(data[newpar12$sheet[i]]))
  if (grepl(Ob, sheet)) {
    newpar12$observer[i] = str_extract(sheet, Ob)
  }
} # 435 rows without observer
modd1 <- modd %>% 
  mutate(file = as.numeric(file), sheet = as.numeric(sheet))
for (i in 1:nrow(modd1)) {
  data = read_excel_allsheets(no_obsv[[modd1$file[i]]])
  sheet = toupper(names(data[modd1$sheet[i]]))
  if (grepl(Ob, sheet)) {
    modd1$observer[i] = str_extract(sheet, Ob)
  }
}
newmodd <- left_join(newpar11, modd, by = c('file', 'sheet','St.Time'))
newmodd1 <- newmodd |> 
  select(date.x, observer, groups, St.Time, focal_individual.x, modifiers.y) |> 
  rename(modifiers = modifiers.y, date = date.x)
still_noob <- meta_add_obs %>% 
  filter(is.na(observer))

meta_add_obs1 <- meta_add_obs %>% 
  select(date, St.Time, observer) %>% 
  rename(code = observer)
newpar13 <- newpar12 %>% 
  rename(code = observer)
meta_add_obs2 <- merge(x = meta_add_obs1, y = obs, by=c("code"), all.x = TRUE)
newpar13 <- merge(x = newpar13, y = obs, by="code", all.x = TRUE)
meta_add_obs2 <- meta_add_obs2[-1]
meta_add_obs3 <- merge(x = meta_no9, y = meta_add_obs2, by=c("date", "St.Time"), all.x = TRUE)
meta_add_obs3 <- meta_add_obs3 %>% 
  rename(observer = name) %>% 
  unique()
newpar13 <- newpar13 %>% 
  select(-code) %>% 
  rename(observer = name) %>% 
  mutate(observer = tolower(observer))
meta_all <- bind_rows(meta8, meta_add_obs3) %>% 
  unique()

# all sheets with no observer
no_noob <- meta_all %>% 
  filter(is.na(observer))
```

```{r newpart+par}
newpart13 <- newpart12[c(1,2,3,4,5,6,15,16,18,19,20,14)]
partner <- newpart12[c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,14,18,19,20,21)]
newpar13$time_spent_running = NA
newpar14 <- newpar13[c(1,2,22,4,3,5,23,13,18,19,20,12)]
partner_p <- newpar13[c(1,2,22,4,3,5,6,12,18,19,20,21)]
newpar14 <- newpar14 %>% 
  mutate(St.Time = as_hms(St.Time),
         end = as_hms(as.numeric(end)))
partner <- partner |> 
  mutate(end = as_hms(end))
partner_p <- partner_p %>% 
  mutate(St.Time = as_hms(St.Time),
         end = as_hms(as.numeric(end)))
newpart13 <- newpart13 |> 
  mutate(end = as_hms(end))
new_whole <- bind_rows(newpar14, newpart13)
partner1 <- bind_rows(partner, partner_p)
new_whole <- new_whole |> 
  mutate(focal_length = as_hms(as.numeric(end)) - St.Time)
partner1 <- partner1 |> 
  mutate(focal_length = as_hms(as.numeric(end)) - St.Time)
```

```{r fill down}
library(tidyr)
partner2 <- partner1 |> 
  arrange(date, groups, observer, St.Time) |> 
  fill(c(focal_individual, end, focal_length),.direction = 'down')
```

```{r focal id}
partner3 <- partner2 |> 
  arrange(focal_individual, date)

partner4 <- partner3 |> 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub('re-dig', 'dig', behavior_category)) |> 
  filter((!is.na(partner) & partner != 'none') | behavior_category == 'dig')
```

```{r dig}
for (i in 1:nrow(partner4)) {
  if (!is.na(partner4[i,]$behavior_category) & partner4[i,]$behavior_category == 'dig') {
    if (!is.na(partner4[i+1,]$behavior_category) & grepl('d\\.|fa\\.', partner4[i+1,]$behavior_category)) {
      partner4[i,]$partner =  partner4[i+1,]$partner
      partner4[i,]$modifiers =  partner4[i+1,]$modifiers
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
partner5 <- partner4 |> 
  filter((!is.na(partner) & !grepl('d\\.|fa\\.', behavior_category)) | behavior_category == 'pred. alarm')  |> 
  mutate(focal_id = dense_rank(paste(focal_individual,date,end)))
```

```{r event_id}
partner6 <- partner5 |> 
  group_by(focal_id, .drop = T) |> 
  mutate(event_id = order(date, St.Time))
```

```{r A.RA back}
#9.20
for (i in 1:nrow(partner5)) {
  if (!is.na(partner6[i,]$A.RA)) {
    if (is.na(partner6[i,]$behavior_category) | partner6[i,]$behavior_category == '') {
      partner6[i,]$behavior_category = partner6[i,]$A.RA
    }
    else {
      partner6[nrow(partner6)+1,] = partner6[i,] |> 
        mutate(behavior_category = partner6[i,]$A.RA)
    }
  }
}
partner7 <- partner6 |> 
  select(-c(A.RA, event_id)) |> 
  mutate(I.R = if_else(grepl('approach', behavior_category), NA, I.R)) |> 
  unique() |> 
  arrange(focal_id, St.Time)
```

```{r}
partner8 <- partner7 |> 
  group_by(focal_id, .drop = T) |> 
  mutate(event_id = order(date, St.Time)) 

```

```{r ir in partner}
ir = c('receive', 'initiate','reciprocate')
IR = paste(ir, collapse= '|')
partner9 <- partner8 |> 
  mutate(partner = gsub('recieve', 'receive', partner))
partner9 <- partner9 |> 
  mutate(I.R = if_else(grepl(IR, partner), str_extract(partner, IR), I.R),
         partner = gsub('receive;|initiate;|reciprocate;', '', partner),
         partner = trim(partner))
partner9 <- partner9 |> 
  mutate(I.R = if_else(grepl('approach', behavior_category), NA, I.R))
```

```{r remove i.r.}
partner10 <- partner9 |> 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub('i\\.|r\\.', '', behavior_category))
```

```{r focal length}
new_whole <- new_whole %>% 
  mutate(focal_length = end - St.Time)
# focals with no end
new_whole1 <- new_whole %>% 
  mutate(focal_length = as.numeric(focal_length),
         focal_length = case_when(focal_length == -33988 ~ 96,
                                  focal_length == -11413 ~ 62,
                                  focal_length == -7966 ~ 1164,
                                  TRUE ~ focal_length))
```

```{r}
# figure out why these rows still miss observer
# because not recorded in the observer code file (added)
  data = read_excel_allsheets(no_obsv[[meta_add_obs$file[12]]])
  #sheet = toupper(names(data[meta_add_obs$sheet[i]]))
  print(toupper(names(data)))

```

```{r}
# add newly added observers
for (i in 1:nrow(no_noob)) {
  data = read_excel_allsheets(no_obsv[[no_noob$file[i]]])
  sheet = toupper(names(data[no_noob$sheet[i]]))
  if (is.na(no_noob$observer[i]) & grepl(Ob, sheet)) {
    no_noob$observer[i] = str_extract(sheet, Ob)
  }
}

meta_add_newobs <- merge(x = no_noob, y = obs, by.x = "observer", by.y = "code", all.x = TRUE)
meta_add_newobs <- meta_add_newobs[-1]
meta_add_newobs <- meta_add_newobs %>% 
  rename(observer = name) %>% 
  unique()

meta_all <- meta_all %>% 
  filter(!is.na(observer))
meta_all <- bind_rows(meta_all, meta_add_newobs) %>% 
  unique()
```

```{r}
partners %>% 
  filter(date==as.POSIXct("2012-12-15 00:00:00", tz="UTC"))

focals %>% 
  filter(groups=="?")
```

```{r}

new2 = data.frame()
file_num2 = 0
for (i in 1:(length(filepath)-1)) {
  
    data = read_excel_allsheets(filepath[[i]])
  for (j in 1:length(data)) {
  new_i <- data.frame(data[j]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
  names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner" 
  date <- new_i$date[1]
  group <- new_i$groups[1]
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  new2 <- bind_rows(new2,new_i)
  
  
  }

}
new3 <- new2 %>% 
  filter(!is.na(groups))
```

```{r}
replacement <- freplace %>% 
  arrange(rowSums(!is.na(select(., "replacement"))), date)
partner_replace <- preplace %>% 
  arrange(rowSums(!is.na(select(., "replacement"))), date) %>% 
  unique() 
partners_modify<- partners_modify %>% 
  filter(! tolower(partner) %in% c("unclear initiator", "initiate","receive","reciprocate","cluster","self","unk group member","none"))

np <- partner_replace %>% 
  filter(is.na(replacement))
```

```{r write}
# save the megadata set into local folder
write_xlsx(new, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/RAW\ Focal\ data\ copy/extracted.xls")
write_xlsx(firstpart, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/RAW\ Focal\ data\ copy/firstpart.xls")
write_xlsx(focals, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/RAW\ Focal\ data\ copy/focals.xls")
write_xlsx(uniquepartner, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/RAW\ Focal\ data\ copy/partners.xls")
write_xlsx(replacement, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/RAW\ Focal\ data\ copy/replacement.xls")
write_xlsx(dreplace, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/RAW\ Focal\ data\ copy/dreplacement.xls")
write_xlsx(partner_replace, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/RAW\ Focal\ data\ copy/partner_replace.xlsx")
write_xlsx(partner_replace, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/RAW\ Focal\ data\ copy/partner_replace.xls")
write_xlsx(meta7, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/meta.xlsx")
write_xlsx(multirep, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/multi_replace.xlsx")
write_xlsx(no_location, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/no_location.xlsx")
write_xlsx(no_loc_noobs, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/noloc_no_obs.xlsx")
write_xlsx(part2_0, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/part2.xlsx")
write_xlsx(df1, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/missing.xlsx")
write_xlsx(meta_all, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/part1.xlsx")

write_csv(sub13, 'data/subset.csv')
```

```{r}
firstpart <- new %>% 
  filter(!is.na(date)&!is.na(group))
```

```{r}
# function selecting columns from all sheets in a file and write into a joint data frame
extract <- function (data) {
  
 for (i in 1:length(data)) {
   
  new_i <- data.frame(data[i]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
  names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner" 
  date <- new_i$date[i]
  group <- new_i$groups[i]
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  new <- bind_rows(new,new_i)
}
}
```

```{r, eval=FALSE}
no_na <- function(x) {
  any(!is.na(x))
}
try2 <- try2 %>% 
  select(where(no_na))
date <- try2$date[1]
group <- try2$groups[1]

names(try2)[grepl("focal_individual", names(try2))] <- "focal_individual"
names(try2)[grepl("partner", names(try2))] <- "partner" 
new <- try2 %>% 
  select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
  filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
  mutate(date = date, groups = group)

  
len <- length(new)
new[,c(len-1, len, 1:(len-2))]
```

```{r}
d2 <- data.frame(try3[2]) %>% 
  select(where(no_na))
d2 <- d2 %>% 
    clean_names()

names(d2)[grepl("date", names(d2))] <- "date"
names(d2)[grepl("groups", names(d2))] <- "groups" 
names(d2)[grepl("focal_individual", names(d2))] <- "focal_individual"
names(d2)[grepl("partner", names(d2))] <- "partner" 

date <- d2$date[1]
group <- d2$groups[1]

new <- d2 %>% 
  select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
  filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
  mutate(date = date, groups = group)

```

```{r}
# navigate to all files
main_path <- "/Users/xcym/Desktop/Muser/data/RAW\ Focal\ data\ copy/"
setwd(main_path)
folders <- list.files(path = main_path, pattern = NULL, all.files = FALSE, full.names = FALSE)

getpath_1 <- function (x) {
  print(str_c(main_path,x))
}

filenames <- getpath_1(folders)
filepaths = list()
for (i in 1:length(filenames)) {
  files <- list.files(path = filenames[i], pattern = NULL, all.files = FALSE, full.names = FALSE)
  getpath_2 <- function (y) {
    print(str_c(filenames[i],"/", y))
  }
  filepaths = append(filepaths,getpath_2(files))
}
filepaths <- filepaths[-length(filepaths)]
```

```{r}
# X15_Dec_11 <- read_excel("./data/RAW\ Focal\ data\ copy/2011\ (12)\ December/15-Dec-11.xls", 
#     sheet = "Wam")
read_excel_allsheets <- function(filename, tibble = FALSE) {
    sheets <- readxl::excel_sheets(filename)
    x <- lapply(sheets, function(X) readxl::read_excel(filename, sheet = X))
    if(!tibble) x <- lapply(x, as.data.frame)
    names(x) <- sheets
    x
}
try3 <- read_excel_allsheets(filepaths[[1]])
```

```{r}
# apply the function to all sheets in a file
new=data.frame()
#date <- try3$date[1]
#group <- try3$groups[1]
# for (i in length(try3)) {
#   ex <- data.frame(try3[i])%>% 
#     select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
#     filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
#     mutate(date = date, groups = group)
#   new = append(new,ex)
# }

for (i in 1:length(aa)) {
  new_i <- data.frame(aa[i]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
  names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner" 
  date <- new_i$date[i]
  group <- new_i$groups[i]
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  new <- bind_rows(new,new_i)
}
```

```{r}
d1 <- data.frame(try3[1]) %>% 
  select(where(no_na)) %>% 
  clean_names()
names(d1)[grepl("date", names(d1))] <- "date"
  names(d1)[grepl("groups", names(d1))] <- "groups" 
  names(d1)[grepl("focal_individual", names(d1))] <- "focal_individual"
  names(d1)[grepl("partner", names(d1))] <- "partner" 
  date <- d1$date[i]
  group <- d1$groups[i]
d1<- d1 %>% 
    select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
```

```{r}
  select(where(no_na)) %>% 
  clean_names()
names(d2)[grepl("date", names(d2))] <- "date"
  names(d2)[grepl("groups", names(d2))] <- "groups" 
  names(d2)[grepl("focal_individual", names(d2))] <- "focal_individual"
  names(d2)[grepl("partner", names(d2))] <- "partner"

  group <- d2$groups[i]
d2<- d2 %>% 
    select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
```

```{r}
  select(where(no_na)) %>% 
  clean_names()
names(d3)[grepl("date", names(d3))] <- "date"
  names(d3)[grepl("groups", names(d3))] <- "groups"

  group <- d3$groups[i]
d3<- d3 %>% 
    select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
```

```{r}
d <- bind_rows(d1,d2)
d<-bind_rows(d,d3)
```

```{r}
try8 <- read_excel_allsheets(filepath[[8]])
d3 <- data.frame(try8[3]) %>% 
  select(where(no_na)) %>% 
  clean_names()
names(d3)[grepl("date", names(d3))] <- "date"
  names(d3)[grepl("groups", names(d3))] <- "groups" 
  names(d3)[grepl("focal_individual", names(d3))] <- "focal_individual"
  names(d3)[grepl("partner", names(d3))] <- "partner" 
  date <- d3$date[i]
  group <- d3$groups[i]
d3<- d3 %>% 
    select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
```

```{r}
d = data.frame()
for (i in 2) {
  new_i <- data.frame(try8[i]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
  names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner" 
  date <- new_i$date[i]
  group <- new_i$groups[i]
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  d <- bind_rows(new,new_i)
}
```

```{r}
# issue with date
try951 <- read_excel_allsheets(filepath[[951]])
for (i in 1:length(try951)) {
  new_i <- data.frame(try951[i]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
  names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner" 
  date <- new_i$date[i]
  group <- new_i$groups[i]
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  d <- bind_rows(d,new_i)
}
```

```{r}
# modify date
try76 <- read_excel_allsheets(filepath[[76]])
for (i in 7) {
  new_i <- data.frame(try76[i]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
  names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner" 
  date <- new_i$date[i]
  group <- new_i$groups[i]
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(contains("focal_individual"), contains("partner")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  d <- bind_rows(d,new_i)
}
try76_71 <- data.frame(try76[7]) %>% 
  clean_names()
names(try76_71)[grepl("date", names(try76_71))] <- "date"
try76_71 <- try76_71 %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30"))
try76_71 %>% 
  filter(is.na(date))


if (!is.POSIXct(try76_71$date)) {
    try76_71$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
  }
```

```{r}
try12 <- read_excel_allsheets(filepath[[2]])
d <- data.frame(try12[5])%>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
names(d)[grepl("date", names(d))] <- "date"
  names(d)[grepl("groups", names(d))] <- "groups" 
  names(d)[grepl("focal_individual", names(d))] <- "focal_individual"
d <- d  %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(focal_individual)))
for (i in 5) {
  new_i <- data.frame(try12[i]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
  
  date <- new_i$date[i]
  group <- new_i$groups[i]
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(contains("focal_individual")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  d <- bind_rows(d,new_i)
}
typeof(d$focal_individual[8])
try76_71 <- data.frame(try76[7]) %>% 
  clean_names()
names(try76_71)[grepl("date", names(try76_71))] <- "date"
try76_71 <- try76_71 %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30"))
try76_71 %>% 
  filter(is.na(date))


if (!is.POSIXct(try76_71$date)) {
    try76_71$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
  }
```

```{r}
d = data.frame()
try8_2 <- data.frame(try8[2]) %>% 
  select(where(no_na)) %>% 
  clean_names()
new_i <- try8_2

  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
  new_i <- new_i[is.na(as.numeric(new_i$focal_individual)),] 
  names(new_i)[5] = str_c(names(new_i[5]),5)
  l <- duplicated(colnames(new_i))
  for (i in 1:length(l)) {
    if (l[i]==TRUE) {
      names(new_i[i]) = str_c(names(new_i[i]),i)
    }
  }
    new_i <- new_i %>% 
      select(where(no_na))
```

```{r}
  date <- new_i$date[1]
  group <- new_i$groups[1]
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(focal_individual) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  
  if (!is.POSIXct(new_i$date)) {
    new_i$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
  }
  
  d <- bind_rows(d,new_i) %>% 
    unique()
  
```

```{r}
trymult = list()
  trymult <- read_excel_allsheets(filepath[[36]]) 
  new_i <- data.frame(trymult[3]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()

  names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 

  parts <- new_i[ ,grepl( "partner" , names( new_i ) )]

  date <- new_i$date[i]
  group <- new_i$groups[i]
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(contains("partner")) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  new_i <- new_i %>% 
    mutate(partners = if_else(is.na(new_i[[1]]), new_i[[2]], new_i[[1]]))
  new_i <- new_i[-c(1,2)]

```

```{r}
try49 <- read_excel_allsheets(filepath[[49]]) 
new_i <- data.frame(try49[2]) %>% 
    select(where(no_na)) %>% 
    clean_names()
  

names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
  names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
  names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner"
  
  date <- new_i$date[1]
  group <- new_i$groups[1]
  is.null(new_i$partner)
  new_i<- new_i %>% 
    select(focal_individual) %>% 
    filter(rowSums(is.na(.)) != ncol(.)) %>% 
    mutate(date = date, groups = group)
  
  if (!is.POSIXct(new_i$date)) {
    new_i$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
  }
```

```{r}
data = read_excel_allsheets(with_obsv[[2]])
names <- data.frame(excel_sheets(with_obsv[[2]])) 

data = read_excel_allsheets(with_obsv[[90]])
meta1 <- data.frame()
  for (j in 1:2) {
    new_i <- data.frame(data[j]) %>% 
      select(where(no_na)) %>% 
      clean_names()
}
names %>% 
  clean_names()
new_i <- data.frame(data[1]) %>% 
      select(where(no_na)) %>% 
      clean_names() 
names(new_i)[grepl("behavior", names(new_i))] <- "behavior_category"
names(new_i)[grepl("time", names(new_i))] <- "St.Time" 
new_i <- new_i %>% 
  mutate(St.Time = as_hms(St.Time),
         End.Time = St.Time)
```

```{r parttern}
# traverse through all files with observer
# Dig & GA
## 2 duration behavior can't overlap，after coding End.Time column, compare the start - end time of consecutive d behaviors. If (pseudo) start[i+1] < end[i], then set end[i] = start[i+1] (to do this, find !is.na(End.Time) then get the St.Time)
pattern <- c("ga","dig", "re-dig", "gt", "pred. alarm", "groom", "huddle", "renn", "crash") # to add according to data sets
Pattern = paste(pattern, collapse="|")
inter <- c("in burr/bh","out of view")
Inter = paste(inter, collapse="|")

part2 <- data.frame()
missing <- list(c(16,5))
errors <- list(c(0,0))
```

```{r endtime}
# multi part use previous indices to exclude -> do not include partner at all
for (i in 1:length(with_obsv)) {
  tryCatch({
    error = FALSE
    p = with_obsv[[i]]
    #if (p %in% filepaths[c(36, 43, 134, 158, 174, 187, 190, 220, 312)]) 
     # next
    
    sheets = excel_sheets(path = p)
  
    for (j in 1:length(sheets)) {
      data <- read_excel(path = p, sheet = sheets[j])
      new_i <- data.frame(data) %>% 
        select(where(no_na)) %>% 
        clean_names() 
      
      if(nrow(new_i)!=0) {
        
        # sheets missing col names
        #if (sum(str_detect(names(new_i), '^x[[:digit:]]+$')) > 0) {
         # missing = c(missing,list(c(i,j)))
         # next
        #}
        names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
        names(new_i)[2] <- "St.Time"
        names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
        names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
        names(new_i)[grepl("behavior", names(new_i))] <- "behavior_category"
        names(new_i)[grepl("observ", names(new_i))] <- "observer"
        names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner"
        names(new_i)[grepl("time", names(new_i)) & grepl("running", names(new_i))] <- "time_spent_running"
        
        #r/i in partner
        #new_i <- new_i[!grepl("partner", names(new_i))]
        
        new_i <- new_i %>% 
          filter(!is.na(behavior_category)) %>% 
          mutate(behavior_category = case_when(grepl("Out of view", behavior_category) & !grepl("End", behavior_category) ~ "Out of view",  
                                                grepl("renn", behavior_category) & !grepl("End", behavior_category) ~ "renovation",
                                                grepl(paste(c("Burr/BH","burrow/bolthole"),  collapse="|"), behavior_category) & !grepl("End", behavior_category) ~ "Burr/BH",
                                         TRUE ~ behavior_category))
        
        new_i <- select(new_i, where(no_na))
        #colnames(new_i)[2] <- "St.Time"
        names(new_i)[tolower(names(new_i)) %in% c("time","time_1", "time_2")] <- "St.Time"
        
        # get rid of the character time column
        new_i <- new_i[!grepl("time_[[:digit:]]+$", names(new_i))]
      
        if (is.character(new_i$time_spent_running)) {
          new_i <- new_i %>% 
            select(-time_spent_running)
        }
        
        if ("life_history" %in% names(new_i)) {
          new_i <- new_i %>% 
            mutate(life_history = as.character(life_history))
        }
        
        
        new_i <- new_i %>% 
          mutate(St.Time = as_hms(St.Time),
                 End.Time = St.Time)
        new_i <- new_i %>% 
          mutate(End.Time = ifelse(grepl('End', behavior_category), as_hms(End.Time), NA))
        
        try1 <- new_i %>% 
          arrange(St.Time)
              
        
        if (!is.POSIXct(try1$date)) {
              try1$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
            }
         
        
           
        part2 <- bind_rows(part2,try1)
        
      }
    }
    print(i)
  }, error = function(e) {error <<- TRUE})
  
  if (error) {
    errors <- c(errors,list(c(i,j)))
    next               
  }
  
  print(i)
}

# Problems:
## (16,5) (19,3) missing column names, r was auto assigning names "Xn"
## multipartner   
## (202, 3) deleted life_history


par2 = data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(no_obsv)) {
  tryCatch({
    error1 = FALSE
    p = no_obsv[[i]]
    if (p %in% filepaths[c(43, 158, 174)]) # 187, 190, 220, 312
      next
    
    sheets = excel_sheets(path = p)
  
    for (j in 1:length(sheets)) {
      data <- read_excel(path = p, sheet = sheets[j])
      new_i <- data.frame(data) %>% 
        select(where(no_na)) %>% 
        clean_names() 
      
      if(nrow(new_i)!=0) {
        
        # sheets missing col names
        if (sum(str_detect(names(new_i), '^x[[:digit:]]+$')) > 0) {
          missing = c(missing,list(c(i,j)))
          next
        }
        names(new_i)[grepl("date", names(new_i))] <- "date"
        names(new_i)[grepl("groups", names(new_i))] <- "groups" 
        names(new_i)[grepl("focal_individual", names(new_i))] <- "focal_individual"
        names(new_i)[grepl("behavior", names(new_i))] <- "behavior_category"
        #names(new_i)[grepl("observ", names(new_i))] <- "observer"
        names(new_i)[grepl("partner", names(new_i))] <- "partner"
        names(new_i)[grepl("time", names(new_i)) & grepl("running", names(new_i))] <- "time_spent_running"
        
        #r/i in partner
        #new_i <- new_i[!grepl("partner", names(new_i))]
        
        new_i <- new_i %>% 
          filter(!is.na(behavior_category)) %>% 
          mutate(behavior_category = case_when(grepl("Out of view", behavior_category) & !grepl("End", behavior_category) ~ "Out of view",  
                                                grepl("renn", behavior_category) & !grepl("End", behavior_category) ~ "renovation",
                                                grepl(paste(c("Burr/BH","burrow/bolthole"),  collapse="|"), behavior_category) & !grepl("End", behavior_category) ~ "Burr/BH",
                                         TRUE ~ behavior_category))
        
        new_i <- select(new_i, where(no_na))
        #colnames(new_i)[2] <- "St.Time"
        names(new_i)[tolower(names(new_i)) %in% c("time","time_1", "time_2")] <- "St.Time"
        
        # get rid of the character time column
        new_i <- new_i[!grepl("time_[[:digit:]]+$", names(new_i))]
      
        if (is.character(new_i$time_spent_running)) {
          new_i <- new_i %>% 
            select(-time_spent_running)
        }
        
        if ("life_history" %in% names(new_i)) {
          new_i <- new_i %>% 
            mutate(life_history = as.character(life_history))
        }
        
        
        new_i <- new_i %>% 
          mutate(St.Time = as_hms(St.Time),
                 End.Time = St.Time)
        new_i <- new_i %>% 
          mutate(End.Time = ifelse(grepl('End', behavior_category), as_hms(End.Time), NA))
        
        try1 <- new_i %>% 
          arrange(St.Time)
              
        
        if (!is.POSIXct(try1$date)) {
              try1$date = as.Date(as.numeric(date), origin = "1899-12-30")
            }
         
        try1$file = i
        try1$sheet = j
           
        par2 <- bind_rows(par2,try1)
        
      }
    }
    print(i)
  }, error1 = function(e) {error1 <<- TRUE})
  
  if (error) {
    errors <- c(errors,list(c(i,j)))
    next               
  }
}
```

```{r delete cols}
part2_1 <- part2 %>% 
  mutate(comments = if_else(!is.na(x17), x17, comments),
         time_spent_running = if_else(!is.na(x37), x37, time_spent_running),
         observer = if_else(!is.na(St.Time.1), St.Time.1, observer)) %>% 
  select(-c(x17,x37,St.Time.1,x19,x18,x36,x35,x23))

part2_1 <- part2_1 %>% 
  mutate(aggression_submission = case_when(!is.na(agression) ~ agression, 
                                           !is.na(aggression) ~ aggression, 
                                           TRUE ~ aggression_submission)) %>% 
  select(-c(agression, aggression))
```

```{r par2_4}
meta_add_obs4 <- meta_add_obs4 %>% 
  mutate(St.Time = as_hms(St.Time))
par2_4 <- merge(x = par2_3, y = meta_add_obs4, by = c("date", "St.Time", "focal_individual", "groups", "file", "sheet"), all.x = TRUE)

# focal indi
par2_5 <- par2_4 %>% 
  rename(observer = observer.x) %>% 
  mutate(observer = if_else(is.na(observer), observer.y, observer)) %>% 
  select(-observer.y) %>% 
  arrange(file, sheet, St.Time)
par2_1 <- par2_1 %>% 
  select(-c(file, sheet))
```

```{r lower}
part2_2 <- data.frame(lapply(part2_1, function(v) {
  if (is.character(v)) return(tolower(v))
  else return(v)
}))

par2_1 <- data.frame(lapply(par2, function(v) {
  if (is.character(v)) return(tolower(v))
  else return(v)
}))

meta_add_obs4 <- data.frame(lapply(meta_add_obs3, function(v) {
  if (is.character(v)) return(tolower(v))
  else return(v)
}))
```

```{r delete extra col}
par2 <- par2 %>% 
  mutate(aggression_submission = case_when(!is.na(aggression) ~ aggression,
                                           TRUE ~ aggression_submission),
         olfactory = case_when(!is.na(other_olfac) ~ other_olfac, 
                               TRUE ~ olfactory)) %>% 
  select(-c(other_olfac, aggression))

```

```{r}
par2_2 <- par2_1 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(!is.na(as.integer(focal_individual)), "", focal_individual))

par2_2 <- par2_2 %>% 
  mutate_if(is.character, ~na_if(., ''))
```

```{r correct}
redig = paste(c("Re-dig", "Re- Dig"), collapse="|")
oov = c("our of view; end (+modifiers)", "out of view end (+modifiers)", "out of view;  end (+modifiers)", "out of view;end (+modifiers)")

# about dig, re-dig, and aggr/sub already fixed
part2_4 <- part2_4 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = case_when(behavior_category == 'start foca' ~ 'start focal',
                                       behavior_category %in% oov ~ 'out of view; end (+modifiers)',
                                       behavior_category == 'other vig' ~ 'other vig.',
                                       behavior_category == 'nearest neigh' ~ 'nearest neigh.',
                                       behavior_category == 'ig; end (+modifiers)' ~ 'igi; end (+modifiers)',
                                       
                                       TRUE ~ behavior_category)) %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub("end + (modifiers)|end(+ modifiers)|end (+ modifiers)", " end (+modifiers)", behavior_category),                                
        behavior_category = gsub("burrow", "burr", behavior_category),
        behavior_category = gsub("/ bh", "/bh", behavior_category),
        behavior_category = gsub("midifiers", "modifiers", behavior_category),
        behavior_category = gsub("comment", "comments", behavior_category),
        behavior_category = gsub("calls", "call", behavior_category),
        behavior_category = gsub("b/bh", "burr/bh", behavior_category))


par2_3 <- par2_2 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = case_when(behavior_category == 'start foca' ~ 'start focal',
                                       behavior_category %in% oov ~ 'out of view; end (+modifiers)',
                                       behavior_category == 'other vig' ~ 'other vig.',
                                       behavior_category == 'nearest neigh' ~ 'nearest neigh.',
                                       behavior_category == 'ig; end (+modifiers)' ~ 'igi; end (+modifiers)',
                                       
                                       TRUE ~ behavior_category)) %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub("end + (modifiers)|end(+ modifiers)|end (+ modifiers)", " end (+modifiers)", behavior_category),                                
        behavior_category = gsub("burrow", "burr", behavior_category),
        behavior_category = gsub("/ bh", "/bh", behavior_category),
        behavior_category = gsub("midifiers", "modifiers", behavior_category),
        behavior_category = gsub("comment", "comments", behavior_category),
        behavior_category = gsub("calls", "call", behavior_category),
        behavior_category = gsub("b/bh", "burr/bh", behavior_category))
```

```{r}
part2_2 <- part2_2 %>% 
  filter(behavior_category != "i found them with almost the whole group at sb, not enough light for b focals")
```

```{r ; at the end}
part2_2 <- part2_2 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub(";$", "", behavior_category))


par2_3 <- par2_3 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub(" ->", "", behavior_category),
         behavior_category = gsub("commentss", "comments", behavior_category))
```

```{r}
part2_3 <- part2_2 %>% 
  arrange(date, groups, observer, St.Time)

par2_5 <- par2_5 %>% 
  unique()
```

```{r correct date and rerun}
# removed rows with no date
part2_3 <- part2_3 %>% 
  mutate(date = case_when(date == as.Date('2012-02-10') ~ as.POSIXct('2013-02-10'), 
                          date == as.Date('1899-12-31') ~ as.POSIXct('2012-07-05'), 
                          TRUE ~ date),
         behavior_category = gsub("inburr", "in burr", behavior_category)) %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(date)) %>% 
  arrange(date, groups, observer, St.Time)
```

```{r impute group}
part2_3 <- part2_3 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub("end (+ modifiers)", " end (+modifiers)", behavior_category)) %>% 
  mutate(groups = if_else(date == as.Date("2012-11-12") & St.Time == as_hms("18:00:36") & observer == "emilien", "uberkatz", groups))
```

```{r near}
part2_3 <- part2_3 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub("near.", "nearest", behavior_category),
         behavior_category = trim(behavior_category))
part2_3 <- part2_3 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub("nearestst|nearestst.", "nearest", behavior_category))
part2_3 <- part2_3 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub("nearestneigh|nearestneighbor", "nearest neigh", behavior_category))
```

```{r insertrow}
insertRow <- function(existingDF, newrow, r) {
  existingDF <- rbind(existingDF,newrow)
  existingDF <- existingDF[order(c(1:(nrow(existingDF)-1),r-0.5)),]
  row.names(existingDF) <- 1:nrow(existingDF)
  return(existingDF)  
}
```

```{r small test}
d <- part2_3[26:32,]

for (i in 1:(nrow(d)-1)) {
  if (d$behavior_category[i] %in% c("ga", "dig")) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(d)) {
      if ((grepl(d$behavior_category[i], d$behavior_category[j]) &
        grepl("end", d$behavior_category[j])) |
        d$behavior_category[i] == d$behavior_category[j] |
        grepl("end focal", d$behavior_category[j])) {
          break
      }
    }   
    if (grepl(d$behavior_category[i], d$behavior_category[j]) &
        grepl("end", d$behavior_category[j])) {
      d$End.Time[i] = d$St.Time[j]
    } else {
      d$End.Time[i] = as_hms(d$St.Time[i]+1)
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
part2_3$End.Time = NA
part2_3 <- part2_3[-ncol(part2_3)]
```

```{r impute values}
part2_2 <- part2_2 %>% 
  filter(behavior_category != 'close call')
for (i in 1:(nrow(par2_3)-1)) {
  if (is.na(par2_3[i,]$date)) {
    if (par2_3[i-1,]$date == par2_3[i+1,]$date) {
      par2_3[i,]$date = par2_3[i+1,]$date
    }
  }
  if (is.na(par2_3[i,]$groups)) {
    if (par2_3[i-1,]$groups == par2_3[i+1,]$groups) {
      par2_3[i,]$groups = par2_3[i+1,]$groups
    }
  }
  print(i)
}

part2_2 <- part2_2 %>% 
  filter(behavior_category != 'close call')
for (i in 1:(nrow(part2_2)-1)) {
  if (is.na(part2_2[i,]$date)) {
    if (part2_2[i-1,]$date == part2_2[i+1,]$date) {
      part2_2[i,]$date = part2_2[i+1,]$date
    }
  }
  if (is.na(part2_2[i,]$observer)) {
    if (part2_2[i-1,]$observer == part2_2[i+1,]$observer) {
      part2_2[i,]$observer = part2_2[i+1,]$observer
    }
  }
  if (is.na(part2_2[i,]$groups)) {
    if (part2_2[i-1,]$groups == part2_2[i+1,]$groups) {
      part2_2[i,]$groups = part2_2[i+1,]$groups
    }
  }
  print(i)
}
```

```{r split}
part2_3_1 <- part2_3 |> 
  mutate(behavior_category = if_else(behavior_category == 'start foca', 'start focal', behavior_category))
for (i in 1:nrow(part2_3)) {
  if (grepl('start focal; ', part2_3_1[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    part2_3_1[nrow(part2_3_1) + 1,] = part2_3_1[i,] %>% mutate(
          behavior_category = gsub('start focal; ', '',  part2_3_1[i,]$behavior_category)
        )
    part2_3_1[i,]$behavior_category = 'start focal'
  }
}
part2_3_1 <- part2_3_1 |> 
  arrange(date, groups, observer, St.Time)

par2_5_1 <- par2_5 |> 
  mutate(behavior_category = if_else(behavior_category == 'start focal;', 'start focal', behavior_category))
for (i in 1:nrow(par2_5)) {
  if (grepl('start focal; ', par2_5_1[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    par2_5_1[nrow(par2_5_1) + 1,] = par2_5_1[i,] %>% mutate(
          behavior_category = gsub('start focal; ', '',  par2_5_1[i,]$behavior_category)
        )
    par2_5_1[i,]$behavior_category = 'start focal'
  }
}
par2_5_1 <- par2_5_1 |> 
  arrange(file, sheet, St.Time)
```


```{r revise endtime GA/Dig}
# Aug 1, 2023 start here
## 1 sec for no end
## check st and end time for consecutive D behaviors then
gadig <- c("ga", "dig")
Gadig <- paste(gadig, collapse="|")
part2_3 <- part2_3_1 |> 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub('re-|re- ', '', behavior_category),
         behavior_category = case_when(behavior_category == 'di' ~ 'dig',
                                       behavior_category == 'ig; end (+modifiers)' ~ 'dig; end (+modifiers)',
                                       TRUE ~ behavior_category))
for (i in 1:(nrow(part2_3)-1)) {
  if (grepl(Gadig, part2_3$behavior_category[i]) &
      !grepl("end", part2_3$behavior_category[i])) {
    s = str_extract(part2_3$behavior_category[i], Gadig)
    k = i+1
    for (j in k:nrow(part2_3)) {
      if (grepl(s, part2_3$behavior_category[j]) |
        grepl("focal", part2_3$behavior_category[j]) |
        part2_3$date[i] != part2_3$date[j] |
        part2_3$observer[i] != part2_3$observer[j] |
        part2_3$groups[i] != part2_3$groups[j]) {
          break
      }
    }  
    if (part2_3$date[i] == part2_3$date[j] & 
        part2_3$observer[i] == part2_3$observer[j] &
        part2_3$groups[i] == part2_3$groups[j]) {
      if (grepl(s, part2_3$behavior_category[j]) &
        grepl("end|focal", part2_3$behavior_category[j])) {
        part2_3$End.Time[i] = part2_3$St.Time[j]
      } else {
        part2_3$End.Time[i] = as_hms(part2_3$St.Time[i]+1)
      }
    }
  }
  #print(i)
}


part2_3 <- part2_3 |> 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub('our of view', 'out of view', behavior_category),
         behavior_category = gsub('in burr/ bh', 'in burr/bh', behavior_category))

par2_5 <- par2_5_1 |> 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub('re-|re- ', '', behavior_category))
for (i in 1:(nrow(par2_5)-1)) {
  if (grepl(Gadig, par2_5$behavior_category[i]) &
      !grepl("end", par2_5$behavior_category[i])) {
    s = str_extract(par2_5$behavior_category[i], Gadig)
    k = i+1
    for (j in k:nrow(par2_5)) {
      if (grepl(s, par2_5$behavior_category[j]) |
        grepl("focal", par2_5$behavior_category[j]) |
        par2_5$file[i] != par2_5$file[j] |
        par2_5$sheet[i] != par2_5$sheet[j] |
        par2_5$groups[i] != par2_5$groups[j]) {
          break
      }
    }  
    if (par2_5$date[i] == par2_5$date[j] & 
        par2_5$file[i] == par2_5$file[j] &
        par2_5$sheet[i] == par2_5$sheet[j] &
        par2_5$groups[i] == par2_5$groups[j]) {
      if (grepl(s, par2_5$behavior_category[j]) |
        grepl("end|focal", par2_5$behavior_category[j])) {
        par2_5$End.Time[i] = par2_5$St.Time[j]
      } else {
        par2_5$End.Time[i] = as_hms(par2_5$St.Time[i]+1)
      }
    }
  }
  #print(i)
}
```

```{r}
part2_3 <- part2_3 %>% 
  mutate(S.Duration = as.numeric(End.Time - St.Time))

par2_6 <- par2_5 %>% 
  mutate(S.Duration = as.numeric(End.Time - St.Time),
         behavior_category = gsub("bolthole", "bh", behavior_category),
         behavior_category = gsub("burrow", "burr", behavior_category),
         behavior_category = gsub("renovation", "renn", behavior_category))
  
```

```{r}
d2 <- part5 %>% 
  filter(!grepl("end", behavior_category) & S.Duration == 0)
```

```{r}
d3 <- part2_4 %>% 
  filter(date == as.Date("2012-09-10") & St.Time > as_hms("17:00:00"))
```

```{r more D (check)}
d <- part2_3 %>% 
  filter(grepl("end", behavior_category))
sort(unique(d$behavior_category))

# right, left, igi, genital groom, gt other, crash, commentss, close call, aggr./sub., run, pup care, resting, play
```

```{r}
nrow(part8 %>% filter(grepl("play", behavior_category) & grepl("end", behavior_category)))
```

```{r note}
dd <- sort(unique(d$behavior_category))
# crash
# in burr/bolthole == in burr/bh
# count frequencies for duration behaviors as well
```

```{r revise endtime for other D}
# rerun on whole for crash and renn
# but par part has no observer (from 2012.4)

whole2_4 <- whole2_41 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub("renovation", "renn", behavior_category))
whole2_4 <- whole2_42 %>% 
  filter(date > as.Date("2012-03-31"))
part2_4 <- part2_3 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub("bolthole", "bh", behavior_category),
         behavior_category = gsub("burrow", "burr", behavior_category),
         behavior_category = gsub("renovation", "renn", behavior_category))
for (i in 1:(nrow(part2_4)-1)) {
  if (grepl(Pattern, part2_4$behavior_category[i]) & 
      !grepl(Gadig, part2_4$behavior_category[i]) &
      !grepl("end", part2_4$behavior_category[i])) {
    s = str_extract(part2_4$behavior_category[i], Pattern)
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(part2_4)) {
      if ((grepl(s, part2_4$behavior_category[j]) &
        grepl("end", part2_4$behavior_category[j])) |
        (grepl(Pattern, part2_4$behavior_category[j]) &
         !grepl("end", part2_4$behavior_category[j])) |
        grepl("focal", part2_4$behavior_category[j]) |
        part2_4$date[i] != part2_4$date[j] |
        part2_4$observer[i] != part2_4$observer[j] |
        part2_4$groups[i] != part2_4$groups[j]) {
          break
      }
    }
    if (part2_4$date[i] == part2_4$date[j] & 
        part2_4$observer[i] == part2_4$observer[j] &
        part2_4$groups[i] == part2_4$groups[j]) {
      part2_4$End.Time[i] = part2_4$St.Time[j]
    }
    else {
      part2_4$End.Time[i] = part2_4$St.Time[j-1]
    }
  }
  #print(i)
}

part2_4 <- part2_4 %>% 
  mutate(St.Time = as_hms(St.Time),
         End.Time = as_hms(End.Time),
         S.Duration = as.numeric(End.Time - St.Time))



for (i in 1:(nrow(par2_6)-1)) {
  if (grepl(Pattern, par2_6$behavior_category[i]) & 
      !grepl(Gadig, par2_6$behavior_category[i]) &
      !grepl("end", par2_6$behavior_category[i])) {
    s = str_extract(par2_6$behavior_category[i], Pattern)
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(par2_6)) {
      if ((grepl(s, par2_6$behavior_category[j]) &
        grepl("end", par2_6$behavior_category[j])) |
        (grepl(Pattern, par2_6$behavior_category[j]) &
         !grepl("end", par2_6$behavior_category[j])) |
        grepl("focal", par2_6$behavior_category[j]) |
        par2_6$date[i] != par2_6$date[j] |
        par2_6$file[i] != par2_6$file[j] |
        par2_6$sheet[i] != par2_6$sheet[j] |
        par2_6$groups[i] != par2_6$groups[j]) {
          break
      }
    }
    if (par2_6$date[i] == par2_6$date[j] & 
        par2_6$file[i] == par2_6$file[j] &
        par2_6$sheet[i] == par2_6$sheet[j] &
        par2_6$groups[i] == par2_6$groups[j]) {
      par2_6$End.Time[i] = par2_6$St.Time[j]
    }
  }
  #print(i)
}

par2_6 <- par2_6 %>% 
  mutate(S.Duration = as.numeric(End.Time - St.Time))


whole2_42 <- whole2_4 #backup
whole2_43 <- whole2_4[-j,] # delete comment row with NAs in other columns
whole2_4 <- whole2_43
whole2_43 <- whole2_4 %>% 
  filter(!is.na(St.Time))
whole2_4 <- whole2_43
i = i - 8
for (i in i:(nrow(whole2_4)-1)) {
  if (grepl(Pattern, whole2_4$behavior_category[i]) & 
      !grepl(Gadig, whole2_4$behavior_category[i]) &
      !grepl("end", whole2_4$behavior_category[i])) {
    s = str_extract(whole2_4$behavior_category[i], Pattern)
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(whole2_4)) {
      if ((grepl(s, whole2_4$behavior_category[j]) &
        grepl("end", whole2_4$behavior_category[j])) |
        (grepl(Pattern, whole2_4$behavior_category[j]) &
         !grepl("end", whole2_4$behavior_category[j])) |
        grepl("focal", whole2_4$behavior_category[j]) |
        whole2_4$date[i] != whole2_4$date[j] |
        whole2_4$observer[i] != whole2_4$observer[j] |
        whole2_4$groups[i] != whole2_4$groups[j]) {
          break
      }
    }
    if (whole2_4$date[i] == whole2_4$date[j] & 
        whole2_4$observer[i] == whole2_4$observer[j] &
        whole2_4$groups[i] == whole2_4$groups[j]) {
      whole2_4$End.Time[i] = whole2_4$St.Time[j]
    }
    else {
      whole2_4$End.Time[i] = whole2_4$St.Time[j-1]
    }
  }
  print(i)
}

whole2_4 <- whole2_4 %>% 
  mutate(St.Time = as_hms(St.Time),
         End.Time = as_hms(End.Time),
         S.Duration = as.numeric(End.Time - St.Time))
```

```{r note}
# rerun end time calc, cuz some focal don't have an end (did)
```

```{r correct duration}
part2_5 <- part2_4 %>% 
  mutate(S.Duration = replace(S.Duration, abs(S.Duration) > 6000, NA))
```

```{r note about time}
# missing end focal:
# 2012-04-05 18:37:53
# 2013-12-07 18:51:14
# 2012-11-21 19:22:32 JXpmET
# 2012-11-05 08:17:59 Emilien DD
# 2012-04-14 last line
# 2012-08-06 17:07:55 end focal earlier than previous line
# 2013-12-05 19:59:09 doesn't exist on that sheet, must be misrecorded date on another file
# 2013-07-20 CHA 0:10:15
```

```{r}
part2_5 %>% 
  filter(date == as.Date("2013-12-05") & St.Time == as_hms("19:59:09")) %>% 
  row_number()
```

```{r}
part2_5 %>% 
  filter(observer == 'charli', groups == 'rascals')
```

```{r time overlap for ga/dig}
garedig <- c("ga", "dig", "re-dig")
Garedig <- paste(garedig, collapse="|")
part2_6 <- part2_5
for (i in 1:(nrow(part2_6)-1)) {
  if (grepl(Garedig, part2_6$behavior_category[i]) & 
        !grepl("end", part2_6$behavior_category[i])) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(part2_6)) {
      if (grepl(Pattern, part2_6$behavior_category[j]) |
        grepl("focal", part2_6$behavior_category[j]) | 
        part2_6$date[i] != part2_6$date[j] |
        part2_6$observer[i] != part2_6$observer[j] |
        part2_6$groups[i] != part2_6$groups[j]) {
          break
      }
    }
      
    if (part2_6$date[i] == part2_6$date[j] & 
        part2_6$groups[i] == part2_6$groups[j] &
        part2_6$observer[i] == part2_6$observer[j] &
        part2_6$End.Time[i] > part2_6$St.Time[j]) {
      part2_6$End.Time[i] = part2_6$St.Time[j]
    }
  }
  #print(i)
}

part2_6 <- part2_6 %>% 
  mutate(S.Duration = as.numeric(End.Time - St.Time))


par2_7 <- par2_6 %>% 
  mutate(End.Time = if_else(grepl(Pattern, behavior_category) & is.na(End.Time), as_hms(St.Time + 1), as_hms(End.Time)))
for (i in 1:(nrow(par2_7)-1)) {
  if (grepl(Garedig, par2_7$behavior_category[i]) & 
        !grepl("end", par2_7$behavior_category[i])) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(par2_7)) {
      if (grepl(Pattern, par2_7$behavior_category[j]) |
        grepl("focal", par2_7$behavior_category[j]) | 
        par2_7$date[i] != par2_7$date[j] |
        (!is.na(par2_7$observer[i]) & !is.na(par2_7$observer[j]) & par2_7$observer[i] != par2_7$observer[j]) |
        par2_7$groups[i] != par2_7$groups[j]) {
          break
      }
    }
      
    if (par2_7$date[i] == par2_7$date[j] & 
        par2_7$groups[i] == par2_7$groups[j] &
        (is.na(par2_7$observer[i]) | is.na(par2_7$observer[j]) | par2_7$observer[i] == par2_7$observer[j]) &
        par2_7$End.Time[i] > par2_7$St.Time[j]) {
      par2_7$End.Time[i] = par2_7$St.Time[j]
    }
  }
  #print(i)
}

whole2_5 <- whole2_4
for (i in 1:(nrow(whole2_5)-1)) {
  if (grepl(Garedig, whole2_5$behavior_category[i]) & 
        !grepl("end", whole2_5$behavior_category[i])) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(whole2_5)) {
      if (grepl(Pattern, whole2_5$behavior_category[j]) |
```
