```{r ri in partner}
                         grepl("initiate", partner) & !grepl("receive|initiate", I.R) ~ "initiate",
                         TRUE ~ I.R))

```

```{r ir in bc}
part9_7 <- part9_6 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub("receive|initiate", "", behavior_category)) %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = trim(behavior_category))

part9_7 <- part9_6 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub('initiate ', 'i.', behavior_category)) %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub('receive ', 'r.', behavior_category))

par18 <- par17 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub("receive|initiate", "", behavior_category)) %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = trim(behavior_category))

part9_8 <- part9_7 %>% 
  select(-c(pup_care, sex, life_history, olfactory, play))
par18_1 <- par18 %>% 
  select(-c(pup_care, sex, olfactory, play, file, sheet)) %>% 
  mutate(focal_type = NA)

whole <- bind_rows(par18_1, part9_8)
```

```{r clean}
# storm coming up, out of focal
newpart12 <- newpart12 %>% 
  filter(!grepl('storm coming up', behavior_category),
         behavior_category != "lazuli foraging at a couple of hundred meters all the morning") %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub('!|begin ', '', behavior_category)) 


newpar11 <- newpar10 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = stri_replace_all_fixed(behavior_category, pattern = c("trgt.", "soc.", "pbite", "winner unclear", 'ff.w'), replacement = c("target", "social", "play bite", "unclear winner", 'few'), vectorize_all = FALSE))
write_xlsx(newpart12, 'data/newpart12.xlsx')
write_xlsx(newpar11, 'data/newpar11.xlsx')
part9_7 <- part9_7 %>% 
  mutate(A.RA = if_else(behavior_category == 'approac', 'approach', A.RA),
         behavior_category = gsub('approac', "", behavior_category))
part9_8 <- part9_7 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = stri_replace_all_fixed(behavior_category, pattern = c("soc.", "gen.", "trgt.", "f comp", "predator", "call.", "  "), replacement = c("social", "genitals", "target", "fcomp", "pred.", "call", " "), vectorize_all = FALSE))

whole1 <- whole %>% 
  mutate(A.RA = if_else(behavior_category == 'approac', 'approach', A.RA),
         behavior_category = gsub('approac', "", behavior_category)) %>%  
  mutate(behavior_category = stri_replace_all_fixed(behavior_category, pattern = c("soc.", "gen.", "trgt.", "f comp", "predator", "call.", "  ", "bolthole"), replacement = c("social", "genitals", "target", "fcomp", "pred.", "call", " ", "bh"), vectorize_all = FALSE))
```

```{r add i./r.}
part9_9 <- part9_8 %>% 
  filter(!grepl("end", behavior_category)) %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = case_when(I.R == "receive" ~ str_c("r.", behavior_category),
                                       I.R == "initiate" ~ str_c("i.", behavior_category),
                                       TRUE ~ behavior_category))

whole2 <- whole1 %>% 
  filter(!grepl("end", behavior_category)) %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = case_when(I.R == "receive" ~ str_c("r.", behavior_category),
                                       I.R == "initiate" ~ str_c("i.", behavior_category),
                                       TRUE ~ behavior_category))
# newest dataset
```

```{r clean 12.8}
whole2_1 <- whole2 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = stri_replace_all_fixed(behavior_category, pattern = c("pbite", "block , lose", "ren.", "renn. ()", "i.i."), replacement = c("play bite", "block", "renn.", "renn.", "i."), vectorize_all = FALSE)) %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub('[[:punct:]]+$', '', behavior_category)) %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = case_when(grepl("near", behavior_category) ~ "nearest neigh",
                                       TRUE ~ behavior_category))
whole2_2 <- whole2_1 %>% 
  filter(behavior_category != "b" & behavior_category != "v" & behavior_category != "" & behavior_category != "left" & behavior_category != "right" & behavior_category != "lazuli foraging at a couple of hundred meters all the morning" & behavior_category != "i" & behavior_category != "r" & behavior_category != "win" & behavior_category != "unclear winner") %>% 
  filter(!grepl("fled|weights|rain|battery|fecal|lead|gt other", behavior_category)) 


# clean i.dig etc.

whole2_3 <- whole2_2 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = case_when(behavior_category == 'i.dig' ~ gsub("i.", "", behavior_category),
                                       behavior_category == 'r.dig' ~ gsub("r.", "", behavior_category),
                                       behavior_category == 'r.ga' ~ gsub("r.", "", behavior_category),
                                       behavior_category == 'i.comments' ~ gsub("i.", "", behavior_category),
                                       behavior_category == 'r.comments' ~ gsub("r.", "", behavior_category),
                                       TRUE ~ behavior_category))

whole2_4 <- whole2_3 %>% 
  filter(behavior_category != "r.right" & behavior_category != "r.left" & behavior_category != "rt (vazm050" & behavior_category != "r.life history")
```

```{r add i/r}
new_whole1_1 <- new_whole %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = case_when(behavior_category == 'receive' ~ 'r.play',
                                       behavior_category == 'social anal mark.' ~ 'social anal mark',
                                       behavior_category == 'aggr.play' ~ 'aggr. play',
                                       behavior_category == 'genitals r.sniff' ~ 'r.gen. sniff',
                                       behavior_category == 'sniff gen.' ~ 'sniff genitals',
                                       behavior_category == 'mark r.sniff' ~ 'r.mark sniff',
                                       behavior_category == 'r.gen. sniff' ~ 'r.sniff genitals',
                                       TRUE ~ behavior_category))
new_whole1_1 <- new_whole1_1 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = if_else(!(grepl('r\\.|i\\.', behavior_category) | grepl(Pattern, behavior_category) | behavior_category == 'comments' | behavior_category == 'start focal' | behavior_category == '' | grepl(Modi, behavior_category) | grepl(Inter, behavior_category)), str_c('i.', behavior_category), behavior_category),
         behavior_category = if_else(behavior_category == 'trgt. beg', 'i.trgt. beg', behavior_category))
```

```{r columns}
# trim and ; first
# 8.31 starts here (new_whole1 just formed)
newcols <- list()

part17_2 <- part17_2 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = if_else(behavior_category=='dig;commentss', 'dig', behavior_category))

for (i in 1:nrow(part17_2)) {
  if (!part17_2[i,]$behavior_category %in% newcols) {
    newcols = c(newcols, part17_2[i,]$behavior_category)
  }
  print(i)
}
for (i in 1:nrow(new_whole1_1)) {
  if (!(new_whole1_1[i,]$behavior_category %in% newcols | new_whole1_1[i,]$behavior_category %in% c('comments', '', 'start focal', 're-dig'))) {
    newcols = c(newcols, new_whole1_1[i,]$behavior_category)
  }
}
for (i in 1:nrow(newpart12)) {
  if (!newpart12[i,]$behavior_category %in% newcols) {
    newcols = c(newcols, newpart12[i,]$behavior_category)
  }
}
for (i in 1:nrow(newpar11)) {
  if (!newpar11[i,]$behavior_category %in% newcols) {
    newcols = c(newcols, newpar11[i,]$behavior_category)
  }
}

for (i in i:nrow(whole2_4)) {
  if (!whole2_4[i,]$behavior_category %in% newcols) {
    newcols = c(newcols, whole2_4[i,]$behavior_category)
  }
  print(i)
}

count <- list("n_dig", "n_ga", "n_gt", "n_groom", "n_renn", "n_huddle", "n_pred_alarm", "n_out_of_view", "n_inburr")
newcols1 <- newcols1[2:length(newcols1)]
newcols <- sort(unique(unlist(newcols)))

#cols <- c(count, newcols1)
more_cols <- str_c(pattern, "_count")
more_cols <- more_cols[more_cols!="re-dig_count"]
cols <- c(more_cols, newcols)

part17_1 = data.frame(matrix(nrow = nrow(part17_2), ncol = length(newcols)))
colnames(part17_1) = newcols
part17_1 <- part17_1[!is.na(names(part17_1)) & names(part17_1)!='']
part17_1[is.na(part17_1)] = 0
#part17_1 <- part17_1[-1]
whole3 = data.frame(matrix(nrow = nrow(whole2_4), ncol = length(cols)))
colnames(whole3) = cols
whole3 <- whole3[!is.na(names(whole3)) & names(whole3)!='']
whole3[is.na(whole3)] = 0

```

```{r add i prefix}
new_whole1_1 <- new_whole1_1 %>% 
  filter(behavior_category != 'i.b/bh ren.')

cols = c(cols, 'out of view_count', 'in burr/bh_count')
new_whole2 = data.frame(matrix(nrow = nrow(new_whole1_1), ncol = length(cols)))
colnames(new_whole2) = cols

new_whole3 <- new_whole1_1 %>% 
  mutate(observer = if_else(observer == 'jetu/jetu', 'jetu', observer)) %>% 
  arrange(date, groups, observer, St.Time)
part17_1 <- part17_1 %>% 
  select(-comments)

whole4 <- whole3[!is.na(names(whole3)) & names(whole3)!='' & !grepl("focal", names(whole3))]

  
part18 <- cbind(part17_2[c(1,2,3,4,5,6,14, 15, 16,17,18,19,20,21,22)], part17_1)
whole4[is.na(whole4)] = 0
whole5 <- cbind(whole2_4[c(1,2,3,4,5,7,9,11,12,13,14,15,17)], whole4)

```

```{r}
d <- part17 %>% 
  filter(grepl("bite", behavior_category))
```

```{r turn}
part18$S.Duration = as.numeric(part18$S.Duration)
part18 <- part18 %>% 
  select(-c(End.Time, percent_hour))

part18 <- part18 %>% 
  select(-`start focal`)

part18 <- part18[!grepl("end|commentss", names(part18))]

cols <- names(part17_1[names(part17_1)!='start focal'])
cols <- names(whole5)
cols <- cols[cols!='start focal']
whole6 <- whole5[,-c(18,160)]
whole6 <- whole6[,-270]
whole6 <- whole6[,-c(11,12,106,76)]
cols <- names(whole6)
whole6 <- whole6 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = case_when(behavior_category == 'r.ga' ~ 'ga',
                                       behavior_category == 'd' ~ 'dig',
                                       TRUE ~ behavior_category))

whole2_4 <- whole2_4 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = case_when(behavior_category == 'r.ga' ~ 'ga',
                                       behavior_category == 'd' ~ 'dig',
                                       TRUE ~ behavior_category)) %>% 
  mutate(time_spent_running = as.numeric(time_spent_running))
whole6_1 <- whole6 #backup
whole6 <- whole6_1 %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date),
         St.Time = as_hms(St.Time),
         S.Duration = as.numeric(S.Duration),
         time_spent_running = as.numeric(time_spent_running))

new_whole3 <- new_whole3 %>% 
  mutate(time_spent_running = as.numeric(time_spent_running))
```

```{r add}

whole6_1 <- whole6 %>% 
  mutate(time_spent_running = if_else(grepl("start focal", behavior_category)&is.na(time_spent_running), 0, time_spent_running))

whole6 <- whole6_1

# time_running, skipped
for (i in i:(nrow(whole2_4)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", whole2_4[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(whole2_4)) {
      if (grepl("start focal", whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      
      if (!is.na(whole2_4[j,]$time_spent_running)) {
        whole6[i,]$time_spent_running = whole6[i,]$time_spent_running + whole2_4[j,]$time_spent_running
      }
    }
  }
  print(i)
}

whole7 <- whole6 %>% 
  select(-time_spent_running)

new_whole4 <- new_whole3
# 574339 (8.27)
for (i in 1:(nrow(new_whole4))) {
  if (grepl("start focal", new_whole4[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    j = i + 1
    while (!grepl("start focal", new_whole4[j,]$behavior_category) & j <= nrow(new_whole4)) {
      new_whole4[i,]$time_spent_running = new_whole4[i,]$time_spent_running + new_whole4[j,]$time_spent_running
      j = j + 1
    }
  }
}
write_xlsx(new_whole4, 'data/new_whole4.xlsx')
new_whole2[is.na(new_whole2)] = 0

# 9.13
new_whole4 <- new_whole4 %>% 
  mutate(comments = if_else(comments == 'comments', NA, comments)) |> 
  filter(behavior_category != 'i.b/bh ren.')
new_whole5 <- cbind(new_whole4[c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,10,11,12,13)], new_whole2)
debug_0816 <- cbind(new_whole4[c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,10,11,12,13)], new_whole2)
# backup: new_whole5_1 <- new_whole5
debug_0816_1 <- debug_0816
```

```{r success}
for (i in 1:(nrow(whole7)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", whole7[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(whole7)) {
      if (grepl("start focal", whole7[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      
      if (!is.na(whole7[j,]$modifiers) & whole7[j,]$modifiers == 'success') {
        whole7[i,]$modifiers = 'success'
      }
    }
    print(i)
  }
}

for (i in 1:(nrow(new_whole4)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", new_whole4[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(new_whole4)) {
      if (grepl("start focal", new_whole4[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      
      if (!is.na(new_whole4[j,]$modifiers) & new_whole4[j,]$modifiers == 'success') {
        new_whole4[i,]$modifiers = 'success'
      }
    }
  }
}
# back to 5
new_whole5_2 <- new_whole5[!is.na(names(new_whole5))]
debug_0816_2 <- debug_0816[!is.na(names(debug_0816))]
# 0721
cols1 <- cols[!is.na(cols)]
```

```{r}
#for (i in i:i) {
for (i in 1:(nrow(new_whole5)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", new_whole5[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(new_whole5)) {
    #for (j in (j+1):248419) {
      if (grepl("start focal", new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      if (!is.na(new_whole4[j,]$comments)) {
        new_whole5[i,]$comments = str_c(new_whole5[i,]$comments, new_whole4[j,]$comments, sep = ";")
      }
      #if (!is.na(new_whole4[j,]$modifiers) & new_whole4[j,]$modifiers == 'success') {
        #new_whole5[i,]$modifiers = 'success'
      #}
      new_whole5[i,]$time_spent_running = new_whole5[i,]$time_spent_running + new_whole4[j,]$time_spent_running
      
      if (!is.na(new_whole4[j,]$A.RA)) {
        new_whole5[i,]$A.RA = new_whole4[j,]$A.RA
      }
    }
  }
}

new_whole5_2 <- new_whole5_2 |> 
  mutate(time_spent_running = if_else(is.na(time_spent_running), 0, time_spent_running))
new_whole4 <- new_whole4 |> 
  mutate(time_spent_running = if_else(is.na(time_spent_running), 0, time_spent_running))
new_whole5 <- new_whole5_2
#for (i in i:i) {
for (i in 1:(nrow(new_whole5)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", new_whole5[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(new_whole5)) {
    #for (j in (j+1):33025) {
      if (grepl("start focal", new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      else if (new_whole4[j,]$time_spent_running != 0) {
        new_whole5[i,]$time_spent_running = new_whole5[i,]$time_spent_running + new_whole4[j,]$time_spent_running
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
whole7_1 <- whole7[200000:400000,]
whole7_2 <- whole7[400001:600000,] # +1 to the last in whole7_1
whole7_3 <- whole7[600000:nrow(whole7),]
write.csv(whole7_1, "data/whole7_1.csv")
write.csv(whole7_2, "data/whole7_2.csv")
write.csv(whole7_3, "data/whole7_3.csv")
write_xlsx(more2, "data/more2.xlsx")
write_xlsx(more3, "data/more3.xlsx")
write_xlsx(aug_noob4, "data/aug_noob4.xlsx")
write_csv(new_whole5, "data/new_whole5.csv")

write_xlsx(par11_4, "data/par11_4.xlsx")
write_xlsx(part15_3, "data/part15_3.xlsx")

whole2_4 <- whole2_4 %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date),
         St.Time = as_hms(St.Time),
         S.Duration = as.numeric(S.Duration),
         time_spent_running = as.numeric(time_spent_running))

for (i in 1:(nrow(whole2_4)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", whole2_4[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(whole2_4)) {
      if (grepl("start focal", whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      
      if (!is.na(whole2_4[j,]$comments)) {
        whole6[i,]$comments = str_c(whole6[i,]$comments, whole2_4[j,]$comments, sep = ";")
      }
      
      if (grepl('dig', whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        whole6[i,]$dig = whole6[i,]$dig + whole2_4[j,]$S.Duration
        whole6[i,]$dig_count = whole6[i,]$dig_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('ga', whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        whole6[i,]$ga = whole6[i,]$ga + whole2_4[j,]$S.Duration
        whole6[i,]$ga_count = whole6[i,]$ga_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('gt', whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        whole6[i,]$gt = whole6[i,]$gt + whole2_4[j,]$S.Duration
        whole6[i,]$gt_count = whole6[i,]$gt_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('pred. alarm', whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        whole6[i,]$`pred. alarm` = whole6[i,]$`pred. alarm` + whole2_4[j,]$S.Duration
        whole6[i,]$`pred. alarm_count` = whole6[i,]$`pred. alarm_count` + 1
      } else if (grepl('groom', whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category, cols) + 11
        whole6[i,index] = whole6[i,index] + whole2_4[j,]$S.Duration
        whole6[i,]$groom_count = whole6[i,]$groom_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('huddle', whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category, cols) + 11
        whole6[i,index] = whole6[i,index] + whole2_4[j,]$S.Duration
        whole6[i,]$huddle_count = whole6[i,]$huddle_count + 1
      } else if (whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category %in% cols) {
        index = match(whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category, cols) + 11
        whole6[i,index] = whole6[i,index] + 1
      }
    }
  }
  print(i)
}
#new_whole5_1 <- new_whole5 
# 2025.07.21
debug_whole5 <- new_whole5_2[!is.na(names(new_whole5_2))]
debug_whole5 <- debug_whole5 |> 
  filter(behavior_category !='i.b/bh ren.')
debug_0816_2 <- debug_0816_2 |> 
  filter(behavior_category !='i.b/bh ren.')
new_whole5 <- new_whole5_1[!is.na(names(new_whole5_1))]
new_whole5 <- new_whole5 |> 
  filter(behavior_category !='i.b/bh ren.')
# 9.27
# i = 248372, j = 248388
#for (i in i:i) {
for (i in 1:(nrow(new_whole5)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", new_whole5[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(new_whole5)) {
    #for (j in (j+1):704920) {
      if (grepl("start focal", new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      
      if (grepl('dig', new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        new_whole5[i,]$dig = new_whole5[i,]$dig + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        new_whole5[i,]$dig_count = new_whole5[i,]$dig_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('ga', new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        new_whole5[i,]$ga = new_whole5[i,]$ga + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        new_whole5[i,]$ga_count = new_whole5[i,]$ga_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('gt', new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        new_whole5[i,]$gt = new_whole5[i,]$gt + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        new_whole5[i,]$gt_count = new_whole5[i,]$gt_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('pred. alarm', new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        new_whole5[i,]$`pred. alarm` = new_whole5[i,]$`pred. alarm` + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        new_whole5[i,]$`pred. alarm_count` = new_whole5[i,]$`pred. alarm_count` + 1
      } else if (grepl('groom', new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category, cols) + 12
        new_whole5[i,index] = new_whole5[i,index] + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        new_whole5[i,]$groom_count = new_whole5[i,]$groom_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('huddle', new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category, cols) + 12
        new_whole5[i,index] = new_whole5[i,index] + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        new_whole5[i,]$huddle_count = new_whole5[i,]$huddle_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('crash', new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category, cols) + 12
        new_whole5[i,index] = new_whole5[i,index] + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        new_whole5[i,]$crash_count = new_whole5[i,]$crash_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('renn', new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category, cols) + 12
        new_whole5[i,index] = new_whole5[i,index] + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        new_whole5[i,]$renn_count = new_whole5[i,]$renn_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('in burr', new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category, cols) + 12
        new_whole5[i,index] = new_whole5[i,index] + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        new_whole5[i,]$`in burr/bh_count` = new_whole5[i,]$`in burr/bh_count` + 1
      } else if (grepl('out of view', new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category, cols) + 12
        new_whole5[i,index] = new_whole5[i,index] + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        new_whole5[i,]$`out of view_count` = new_whole5[i,]$`out of view_count` + 1
      } else if (new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category %in% cols) {
        index = match(new_whole5[j,]$behavior_category, cols) + 12
        new_whole5[i,index] = new_whole5[i,index] + 1
      }
    }
  }
}

# 728488, rerun cuz stop didn't let j finish till end
new_whole5_2 <- new_whole5
  # crash, renn not included
# 742179
save(new_whole5, file = 'data/new_whole5.RData')
whole6_2 <- whole6_1 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category == case_when(grepl("groom", behavior_category) ~ "groom",
                                        grepl("huddle", behavior_category) ~ "huddle",
                                        TRUE ~ behavior_category))
```

```{r}
# 0721 debug
i = 1
while (i < nrow(debug_0816_2)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", debug_0816_2[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(debug_0816_2)) {
    #for (j in (j+1):704920) {
      if (grepl("start focal", debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category) | j == nrow(debug_0816_2)) {
        i = j
        break
      }
      
      if (grepl('dig', debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        debug_0816_2[i,]$dig = debug_0816_2[i,]$dig + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        debug_0816_2[i,]$dig_count = debug_0816_2[i,]$dig_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('ga', debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        debug_0816_2[i,]$ga = debug_0816_2[i,]$ga + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        debug_0816_2[i,]$ga_count = debug_0816_2[i,]$ga_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('gt', debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        debug_0816_2[i,]$gt = debug_0816_2[i,]$gt + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        debug_0816_2[i,]$gt_count = debug_0816_2[i,]$gt_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('pred. alarm', debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        debug_0816_2[i,]$`pred. alarm` = debug_0816_2[i,]$`pred. alarm` + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        debug_0816_2[i,]$`pred. alarm_count` = debug_0816_2[i,]$`pred. alarm_count` + 1
      } else if (grepl('groom', debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category, cols1) + 12
        debug_0816_2[i,index] = debug_0816_2[i,index] + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        debug_0816_2[i,]$groom_count = debug_0816_2[i,]$groom_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('huddle', debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category, cols1) + 12
        debug_0816_2[i,index] = debug_0816_2[i,index] + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        debug_0816_2[i,]$huddle_count = debug_0816_2[i,]$huddle_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('crash', debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category, cols1) + 12
        debug_0816_2[i,index] = debug_0816_2[i,index] + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        debug_0816_2[i,]$crash_count = debug_0816_2[i,]$crash_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('renn', debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category, cols1) + 12
        debug_0816_2[i,index] = debug_0816_2[i,index] + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        debug_0816_2[i,]$renn_count = debug_0816_2[i,]$renn_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('in burr', debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category, cols1) + 12
        debug_0816_2[i,index] = debug_0816_2[i,index] + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        debug_0816_2[i,]$`in burr/bh_count` = debug_0816_2[i,]$`in burr/bh_count` + 1
      } else if (grepl('out of view', debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category, cols1) + 12
        debug_0816_2[i,index] = debug_0816_2[i,index] + new_whole4[j,]$S.Duration
        debug_0816_2[i,]$`out of view_count` = debug_0816_2[i,]$`out of view_count` + 1
      } else if (debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category %in% cols1) {
        index = match(debug_0816_2[j,]$behavior_category, cols1) + 12
        debug_0816_2[i,index] = debug_0816_2[i,index] + 1
      }
    }
  }
  else {
    i = i + 1
  }
  print(i)
}
write_csv(debug_whole5, 'data/debug_whole5.csv')
write_xlsx(debug_whole5, 'data/debug_whole5.xlsx')
saveRDS(debug_whole5, file = "data/debug_whole5.rds") 
debug_whole6 <- read_rds("data/debug_whole5.rds")
```

```{r leading periods}
new_whole6 <- new_whole5[(!is.na(names(new_whole5)) & names(new_whole5) != '')]
new_whole6 <- new_whole6 %>% 
  mutate(comments = if_else(!is.na(comments)&comments!='', gsub('^\\.+|\\.+$', '', comments), comments))

debug_0816_3 <- debug_0816_2[(!is.na(names(debug_0816_2)) & names(debug_0816_2) != '')]
debug_0816_3 <- debug_0816_3 %>% 
  mutate(comments = if_else(!is.na(comments)&comments!='', gsub('^\\.+|\\.+$', '', comments), comments))
```

```{r correct focal_length}
# skipped
new_whole7 <- new_whole6 |> 
  select(-focal_length)
match_focal_length <- new_whole[c(1:5, 13)]
new_whole7 <- merge(new_whole7, match_focal_length, by = c('date', 'St.Time', 'observer', 'groups', 'focal_individual'), all.x = T)

new_whole6 <- new_whole6 |> 
  mutate(`out of view` = if_else(`out of view` > focal_length, 0, `out of view`),
         `in burr/bh` = if_else(`in burr/bh` > focal_length, 0, `in burr/bh`),
         focal_length = focal_length - `in burr/bh` - `out of view`)

debug_0816_4 <- debug_0816_3 |> 
  mutate(`out of view` = if_else(`out of view` > focal_length, 0, `out of view`),
         `in burr/bh` = if_else(`in burr/bh` > focal_length, 0, `in burr/bh`),
         focal_length = focal_length - `in burr/bh` - `out of view`)
```


```{r}
for (i in 1:(nrow(whole2_4)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", whole2_4[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(whole2_4)) {
      if (grepl("start focal", whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      
      if (!is.na(whole2_4[j,]$comments)) {
        whole6_2[i,]$comments = str_c(whole6_2[i,]$comments, whole2_4[j,]$comments, sep = ";")
      }
      
      if (grepl(Pattern, whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category, cols) + 11
        whole6_2[i,index] = whole6_2[i,index] + whole2_4[j,]$S.Duration
      }
      
      else if (whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category %in% cols) {
        index = match(whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category, cols) + 11
        whole6_2[i,index] = whole6_2[i,index] + 1
      }
    }
  }
  # print(i)
}
```

```{r}
# here 8.30
for (i in 1:(nrow(whole2_4)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", whole2_4[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(whole2_4)) {
      if (grepl("start focal", whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      
      if (!is.na(whole2_4[j,]$comments)) {
        whole6_2[i,]$comments = str_c(whole6_2[i,]$comments, whole2_4[j,]$comments, sep = ";")
      }
      
      if (grepl(Pattern, whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category, cols) + 11
        whole6_2[i,index] = whole6_2[i,index] + whole2_4[j,]$S.Duration
      }
      
      else if (whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category %in% cols) {
        index = match(whole2_4[j,]$behavior_category, cols) + 11
        whole6_2[i,index] = whole6_2[i,index] + 1
      }
    }
  }
  # print(i)
}     
```

```{r debug}
for (i in 1:(nrow(whole2_4)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", whole2_4[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    print(i)
  }
}
```

```{r subset}
whole7 <- whole6 %>% 
  mutate(location = as.character(location)) %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(grepl("burrow", focal_individual), "burrow", location)) %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(grepl("forage", focal_individual), "forage", location)) %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(grepl("lactation", focal_individual), "lactation", location))


new_whole6$location = NA
new_whole7 <- new_whole6 %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(grepl("burrow", focal_individual), "burrow", location)) %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(grepl("forage", focal_individual), "forage", location)) %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(grepl("lactation", focal_individual), "lactation", location))

debug_0816_4$location = NA
debug_0816_5 <- debug_0816_4 %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(grepl("burrow", focal_individual), "burrow", location)) %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(grepl("forage", focal_individual), "forage", location)) %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(grepl("lactation", focal_individual), "lactation", location))
charli <- charlie[-1,]
ids <- unique(tolower(charli$kmp.id))
ids <- c(ids, unique(tolower(lizzy$kmp.id)))
ids <- unique(ids)
Codes = paste(unique(tolower(codes)), collapse="|")
whole8_2 <- merge(x = whole7, y = dic, by=c("focal_individual","groups"), all.x = TRUE)
whole8_3 <- whole8_2 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(grepl(Codes, focal_individual), str_extract(focal_individual, Codes), focal_individual))
whole8_4 <- whole6%>% 
  filter(focal_individual %in% ids & behavior_category == 'start focal')
whole8_5 <- whole6%>% 
  filter(focal_individual %in% ids)
part14_1 <- part14_1 |> 
  select(-modifiers) |> 
  left_join(mod, by = c('date', 'St.Time', 'groups', 'observer', 'focal_individual'))
new_whole8 <- merge(x = new_whole7, y = dic, by=c("kmp.id", "date", "St.Time", "groups", "observer"), all.x = TRUE)
new_whole8_1 <- new_whole8 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(grepl(Codes, focal_individual), str_extract(focal_individual, Codes), focal_individual))

new_whole8_2_1 <- new_whole8_1%>% 
  filter(focal_individual %in% ids)

debug_0816_6 <- merge(x = debug_0816_5, y = dic, by=c("focal_individual", "groups"), all.x = TRUE)

new_whole8_1 <- new_whole8 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(grepl(Codes, focal_individual), str_extract(focal_individual, Codes), focal_individual))
debug_0816_7 <- debug_0816_6 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(grepl(Codes, focal_individual), str_extract(focal_individual, Codes), focal_individual))

# didn't filter from here (2023.10.3)
#new_whole8_2 <- new_whole8_2_1 %>% 
new_whole8_2 <- new_whole8_1 %>%
  filter(behavior_category == 'start focal') %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(focal_individual!=replacement, replacement, focal_individual))

debug_0816_7 <- debug_0816_7 %>%
  filter(behavior_category == 'start focal') %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(focal_individual!=replacement, replacement, focal_individual))

modpt <- mod |> 
  filter(behavior_category == 'start focal') |> 
  select(date, groups, St.Time, focal_individual, modifiers)
modp <- modd |>  
  filter(behavior_category == 'start focal') |> 
  select(date, groups, St.Time, focal_individual, modifiers)
modw <- bind_rows(modpt, modp) 
mod1 <- merge(x = modw, y = dic, by=c("focal_individual", "groups"), all.x = TRUE)
mod1 <- mod1 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(grepl(Codes, focal_individual), str_extract(focal_individual, Codes), focal_individual))

mod1 <- mod1%>% 
  filter(focal_individual %in% ids)

mod1 <- mod1 %>%  
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(focal_individual!=replacement, replacement, focal_individual))

mod1 <- mod1 |> 
  select(-replacement)

mmod <- bind_rows(newmodd1, mod1) |> 
  select(-focal_individual) |> 
  rename(mod = modifiers, focal_individual = focal_individual.x)

mmod1 <- merge(x = mmod, y = dic, by=c("focal_individual","groups"), all.x = TRUE)
mmod1 <- mmod1 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(grepl(Codes, focal_individual), str_extract(focal_individual, Codes), focal_individual))

mmod1 <- mmod1 %>%  
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(focal_individual!=replacement, replacement, focal_individual))

mmod1 <- mmod1%>% 
  filter(focal_individual %in% ids)
mmod1 <- mmod1 |> 
  select(-replacement)

partner17 <- merge(x = partner16, y = dic, by=c("focal_individual","groups"), all.x = TRUE)
partner17 <- partner17 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(grepl(Codes, focal_individual), str_extract(focal_individual, Codes), focal_individual)) |> 
  arrange(focal_id, event_id)

partner17 <- partner17 %>%  
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(focal_individual!=replacement, replacement, focal_individual))

partner17 <- partner17 |> 
  select(-replacement)
```

```{r partner replace}
partner_rep <- partner_rep %>% 
  mutate_all(tolower) |> 
  rename(partner = Focal_individual) 
names(partner_rep) <- tolower(names(partner_rep))
partner_rep <- partner_rep |> 
  select(-date) |> 
  unique()
partner17_1 <- partner17
partner17 <- merge(x = partner17, y = partner_rep, by=c("partner","groups"), all.x = TRUE)
partner17 <- partner17 %>% 
  mutate(partner = if_else(grepl(Codesp, partner), str_extract(partner, Codesp), partner)) |> 
  arrange(focal_id, event_id)

partner17 <- partner17 %>%  
  mutate(partner = if_else(!is.na(replacement) & replacement !='na' & partner!=replacement, replacement, partner))

partner17 <- partner17 |> 
  select(-replacement)
```

```{r columns}
partner18 <- partner17 |> 
  select(focal_individual, focal_id, event_id, date, groups, observation_start, observation_end, observation_duration, observation_duration_frac_hour, multiple, behavior_category, behavior_duration, I.R, food_quant, food_size, outcome, partner) |> 
  mutate(observation_duration_frac_hour = as.numeric(observation_duration_frac_hour),
         observation_duration = as.numeric(observation_duration)) |> 
  filter(!is.na(partner))
```

```{r id}
dic <- dic %>% 
  mutate_all(tolower)
part18_1 <- merge(part18, dic, by = c("focal_individual", "groups"), all.x = TRUE)

par2_3 <- merge(par2_3, dic, by = c("focal_individual", "groups"), all.x = TRUE)
par2_3 <- par2_3 %>% 
  select(-focal_individual) %>% 
  rename(focal_individual = replacement)

part20 <- part18_1 %>% 
  select(-c(focal_individual,modifiers))
part20 <- part20 %>% 
  select(replacement, everything()) 
  rename(kmp.id = replacement)
part20 <- part20 %>% 
  filter(!grepl("end", behavior_category))
part20 <- part20 %>% 
  select(-behavior_category)
```

```{r renn}
whole12_2 <- whole12_1 %>% 
  select(-renn_count)

```

```{r percent}
whole15 <- whole12_2 %>% 
  dplyr::rename(kmp.id = focal_individual) %>% 
  select(-c(replacement, S.Duration, behavior_category)) %>% 
  mutate(percent_dig = dig/3600,
         percent_ga = ga/3600,
         percent_gt = gt/3600,
         `percent_out of view` = `out of view`/3600,
         `percent_pred. alarm` = `pred. alarm`/3600,
         percent_huddle = (i.huddle + r.huddle)/3600,
         percent_groom = (i.groom + r.groom)/3600)

whole15_1 <- whole14 %>% 
  dplyr::rename(kmp.id = focal_individual) %>% 
  select(-c(S.Duration, behavior_category)) %>% 
  mutate(percent_dig = dig/3600,
         percent_ga = ga/3600,
         percent_gt = gt/3600,
         `percent_out of view` = `out of view`/3600,
         `percent_pred. alarm` = `pred. alarm`/3600,
         percent_huddle = (i.huddle + r.huddle)/3600,
         percent_groom = (i.groom + r.groom)/3600)

# in an hour
new_whole9 <- new_whole8_2 %>% 
  mutate(percent_hour_dig = dig/3600,
         percent_hour_ga = ga/3600,
         percent_hour_gt = gt/3600,
         percent_hour_renn = renn/3600,
         percent_hour_crash = renn/3600,
         `percent_hour_out of view` = `out of view`/3600,
         `percent_hour_pred. alarm` = `pred. alarm`/3600,
         percent_hour_huddle = huddle/3600,
         percent_hour_groom = groom/3600)
debug_0816_8 <- debug_0816_7 %>% 
  mutate(percent_hour_dig = dig/3600,
         percent_hour_ga = ga/3600,
         percent_hour_gt = gt/3600,
         percent_hour_renn = renn/3600,
         percent_hour_crash = renn/3600,
         `percent_hour_out of view` = `out of view`/3600,
         `percent_hour_pred. alarm` = `pred. alarm`/3600,
         percent_hour_huddle = huddle/3600,
         percent_hour_groom = groom/3600)
# in the focal duration

new_whole10 <- new_whole9 %>% 
  mutate(focal_length = as.numeric(focal_length),
         percent_focal_dig = dig/focal_length,
         percent_focal_ga = ga/focal_length,
         percent_focal_gt = gt/focal_length,
         percent_focal_renn = renn/focal_length,
         percent_focal_crash = renn/focal_length,
         `percent_focal_out of view` = `out of view`/focal_length,
         `percent_focal_pred. alarm` = `pred. alarm`/focal_length,
         percent_focal_huddle = huddle/focal_length,
         percent_focal_groom = groom/focal_length)
debug_0816_9 <- debug_0816_8 %>% 
  mutate(focal_length = as.numeric(focal_length),
         percent_focal_dig = dig/focal_length,
         percent_focal_ga = ga/focal_length,
         percent_focal_gt = gt/focal_length,
         percent_focal_renn = renn/focal_length,
         percent_focal_crash = renn/focal_length,
         `percent_focal_out of view` = `out of view`/focal_length,
         `percent_focal_pred. alarm` = `pred. alarm`/focal_length,
         percent_focal_huddle = huddle/focal_length,
         percent_focal_groom = groom/focal_length)
```

```{r notes}
#A.RA & I.R not filled in
```

```{r more info}
lizzy1 <- lizzy[,c(4, 11:19)]
lizzy1 <- lizzy1 %>% 
  mutate_all(tolower)
lizzy2 <- lizzy[,c(4,9)]
lizzy2 <- lizzy2 %>% 
  mutate_all(tolower) %>% 
  rename(birth = birthday)
more <- merge(whole15, lizzy1[!duplicated(lizzy1$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)
more1 <- merge(whole15_1, lizzy1[!duplicated(lizzy1$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)

debug_0816_9 <- debug_0816_9 %>% 
  dplyr::rename(kmp.id = focal_individual)
debug_more <- merge(debug_0816_9, lizzy1[!duplicated(lizzy1$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)

new_whole10 <- new_whole10 %>% 
  dplyr::rename(kmp.id = focal_individual)
new_more <- merge(new_whole10, lizzy1[!duplicated(lizzy1$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)

partner18 <- partner18 %>% 
  dplyr::rename(kmp.id = focal_individual)
p_more <- merge(partner18, lizzy1[!duplicated(lizzy1$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)
charli1 <- charli[,c(19:21,1,2)]
names(charli1) <- tolower(names(charli1))
charli1 <- charli1 %>% 
  rename(kmp.id = Code)
charli1 <- charli1 %>% 
  mutate_all(tolower)
more2 <- merge(more, charli1[!duplicated(charli1$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)

new_more2 <- merge(new_more, charli1[!duplicated(charli1$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)

more3 <-  merge(more1, charli1[!duplicated(charli1$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)
more1 <- more1 %>% 
  arrange(kmp.id, date, observer, St.Time)
more1 <- more1 %>% 
  select(-I.R)
more3 <- more3 %>% 
  arrange(kmp.id, date, observer, St.Time)
more3 <- more3 %>% 
  select(-I.R)
more1_1 <- more1
more1 <- more1_1
more3_1 <- more3

subset1 <- subset[-c(234,235,236,237)]
all1 <- all[-c(234,235,236,237)]

charli2 <- charli1 %>% 
  arrange(Birthday)
charli2_1 <- charli2[1:7,]
charli2_2 <- charli2[8:nrow(charli2),]
charli2_1[1,5] <- '2012-10-22'
charli2_1[2,5] <- '2012-10-22'
charli2_1[3,5] <- '2012-10-22'
charli2_1[4:7,5] <- '2014-02-21'
charli2_1 <- charli2_1 %>% 
  mutate(Birthday = as.Date(Birthday))
charli2_2 <- charli2_2 %>% 
  mutate(Birthday = as.Date(as.numeric(Birthday), origin = "1899-12-30"))

lizzy3 <- lizzy2 %>% 
  mutate(birth = as.Date(birth, format = "%m/%d/%y"))
d2 <- merge(d, lizzy3[!duplicated(lizzy3$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)
charli3 <- bind_rows(charli2_1, charli2_2)
subset2 <- merge(subset1, charli3[!duplicated(charli3$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)
subset2_1 <- merge(subset2, lizzy3[!duplicated(lizzy3$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)
new_subset <- merge(new_more, charli3[!duplicated(charli3$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)
new_subset2 <- merge(new_subset, lizzy3[!duplicated(lizzy3$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)

debug_subset <- merge(debug_more, charli3[!duplicated(charli3$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)
debug_subset2 <- merge(debug_subset, lizzy3[!duplicated(lizzy3$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)

new_p <- merge(p_more, charli3[!duplicated(charli3$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)
new_p1 <- merge(new_p, lizzy3[!duplicated(lizzy3$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)
all2 <- merge(all1, charli3[!duplicated(charli3$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)
all2_1 <- merge(all2, lizzy3[!duplicated(lizzy3$kmp.id),], by = "kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)

subset2_1 <- subset2_1 %>% 
  mutate(Birthday = if_else(!is.na(birth), birth, Birthday)) %>%
  select(-birth)
new_subset2 <- new_subset2 %>% 
  mutate(Birthday = if_else(!is.na(birth), birth, Birthday)) %>%
  select(-c(birth, birthday))

debug_subset2 <- debug_subset2 %>% 
  mutate(Birthday = if_else(!is.na(birth), birth, Birthday)) %>%
  select(-c(birth, birthday))

new_p2 <- new_p1 %>% 
  mutate(Birthday = if_else(!is.na(birth), birth, Birthday)) %>%
  select(-c(birth, birthday))
all2_1 <- all2_1 %>% 
  mutate(Birthday = if_else(!is.na(birth), birth, Birthday)) %>%
  select(-birth)
```

```{r group size}
more1$group_size = NA
more1$discrepancy = NA
groups <- unique(more1$groups)
groups <- unique(new_subset2$groups)
groups <- unique(new_p2$groups)
diary <- diary %>% 
  filter(Group %in% groups) %>% 
  arrange(Group, Date)

dia <- diary %>% 
  group_by(Group) %>% 
  mutate(min_date = min(Date),
         max_date = max(Date)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(MemberCount))

dia1 <- dia %>% 
  rename(groups = Group)
more5 <- merge(more3, dia1, by = 'groups')

for (i in i:nrow(more1)) {
  for (j in 1:nrow(dia)) {
    if (more1[i,]$groups == dia[j,]$Group &
        more1[i,]$date > (dia[j,]$min_date %m-% days(31))  &
        more1[i,]$date < (dia[j,]$max_date %m+% days(31))) {
      more1[i,]$group_size = dia[j,]$MemberCount
      more1[i,]$discrepancy = abs(more1[i,]$date - dia[j,]$Date)
      break
    } 
  }
  j = j + 1
  while (j <= nrow(dia) & more1[i,]$groups == dia[j,]$Group) {
    if (abs(more1[i,]$date - dia[j,]$Date) < more1[i,]$discrepancy) {
      more1[i,]$group_size = dia[j,]$MemberCount
      more1[i,]$discrepancy = abs(more1[i,]$date - dia[j,]$Date)
    } else {
      break
    }
    j = j + 1
  }
  print(i)
}
```

```{r}
part2_3 <- part2_2
```

```{r}
part2_4 <- part2_3 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub('r.r.', 'r.', behavior_category)) %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = gsub('i.i.', 'i.', behavior_category))
```

```{r}
## split behaviors with multivalues
```

```{r}
write_xlsx(part11_2, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/part11_2.xlsx")
write_xlsx(newcols, "/Users/apple/Desktop/Muser/data/newcols.xlsx")
```

```{r whole}
whole6 <- whole6_1
cols <- names(whole6)
pattern <- c("dig", "gt", "ga", "groom", "huddle", "pred. alarm", "renn", "out of view", "in burr/bh")
Pattern = paste(pattern, collapse="|")
for (i in 1:(nrow(whole6)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", whole6[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(whole6)) {
      if (grepl("start focal", whole6[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      
      if (!is.na(whole6[j,7])) {
        whole6[[i,7]] = str_c(whole6[[i,7]], whole6[[j,7]], sep = ";")
      }
      
      if (grepl('dig', whole6[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        whole6[[i,21]] = whole6[[i,21]] + whole6[[j,10]]
        whole6[i,]$dig_count = whole6[i,]$dig_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('ga', whole6[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        whole6[[i,16]] = whole6[[i,16]] + whole6[[j,10]]
        whole6[i,]$ga_count = whole6[i,]$ga_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('gt', whole6[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        whole6[[i,59]] = whole6[[i,59]] + whole6[[j,10]]
        whole6[i,]$gt_count = whole6[i,]$gt_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('pred. alarm', whole6[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        whole6[[i,35]] = whole6[[i,35]] + whole6[[j,10]]
        whole6[i,]$`pred. alarm_count` = whole6[i,]$`pred. alarm_count` + 1
      } else if (grepl('out of view', whole6[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        whole6[[i,32]] = whole6[[i,32]] + whole6[[j,10]]
        whole6[i,]$`out of view_count` = whole6[i,]$`out of view_count` + 1
      } else if (grepl('in burr/bh', whole6[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        whole6[[i,42]] = whole6[[i,42]] + whole6[[j,10]]
        whole6[i,]$`in burr/bh_count` = whole6[i,]$`in burr/bh_count` + 1
      } else if (grepl('groom', whole6[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(whole6[j,]$behavior_category, cols)
        whole6[[i,index]] = whole6[[i,index]] + whole6[[j,10]]
        whole6[i,]$groom_count = whole6[i,]$groom_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('huddle', whole6[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(whole6[j,]$behavior_category, cols) 
        whole6[[i,index]] = whole6[[i,index]] + whole6[[j,10]]
        whole6[i,]$huddle_count = whole6[i,]$huddle_count + 1
      } else if (whole6[j,]$behavior_category %in% cols & whole6[j,]$behavior_category != 'comments') {
        index = match(whole6[j,]$behavior_category, cols) 
        whole6[[i,index]] = whole6[[i,index]] + 1
      } 
    }
  }
  print(i)
}
whole6_2 <- whole6 # backup
```

```{r copied from this point}
Pattern = paste(pattern, collapse="|")
for (i in 1:(nrow(whole6)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", whole6[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(whole6)) {
      if (grepl("start focal", whole6[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      if (grepl(Pattern, whole6[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(whole6[j,]$behavior_category, cols)
        whole6_2[i,index] = whole6_2[i,index] + 1
      }
    }
  }
  print(i)
}
```

```{r}
whole6_3 <- whole6_2 %>% 
  mutate(dig_count = dig,
         ga_count = ga,
         gt_count = gt,
         groom_count = groom + `present groom` + `groom recip` + r.groom + `r.present groom` + `r.groom recip` + i.groom + `i.present groom` + `genital groom` + `r.genital groom` + `i.genital groom`, 
         huddle_count = huddle + i.huddle + r.huddle,
         `pred. alarm_count` = `pred. alarm`,
         renn_count = `burr/bh renn`,
         `out of view_count` = `out of view`,
         `in burr/bh_count` = `in burr/bh`
         )

whole6_4 <- whole6_3
```

```{r run for whole2_4}
whole6_4 <-cbind(whole6_3, whole2_4$partner)
names(whole6_4)[ncol(whole6_4)] = "partner"
whole6_4$IR = NA
whole6_4 <- whole6_4 %>% 
  mutate(IR = if_else(grepl("receive", partner), "receive", "initiate"))

whole6_5 <- whole6_4 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = case_when(IR == "receive" & !grepl("i\\.|r\\.", behavior_category) ~ str_c("r.", behavior_category),
                                       IR == "initiate" & !grepl("i\\.|r\\.", behavior_category) ~ str_c("i.", behavior_category),
                                       TRUE ~ behavior_category))

whole6_6 <- whole6_5 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = case_when(grepl("ga|gt|comment|f\\.|fa\\.|d\\.|focal", behavior_category)  ~ gsub("i\\.|r\\.", "", behavior_category),
                                      behavior_category == "i.ff.tiny.ff.w" ~ "i.ff.tiny",
                                      TRUE ~ behavior_category))
whole8_3 <- whole8_2 %>% 
  mutate(behavior_category = if_else(grepl("comments", behavior_category), "comments", behavior_category))
for (i in 1:nrow(whole8_3)) {
  if ((whole8_3$focal_individual %in% ids) & grepl("start focal", whole8_3[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(whole8_3)) {
      if (grepl("start focal", whole8_3[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      
      if (!is.na(whole8_3[j,]$comments)) {
        whole8_3[i,]$comments = str_c(whole8_3[i,]$comments, whole8_3[j,]$comments, sep = ";")
      }
      
      if (grepl(Pattern, whole8_3[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        index = match(whole8_3[j,]$behavior_category, newcols) + 11
        whole8_3[i,index] = whole8_3[i,index] + whole8_3[j,]$S.Duration
      }
      
      else if (whole8_3[j,]$behavior_category %in% newcols) {
        index = match(whole8_3[j,]$behavior_category, newcols) + 11
        whole8_3[i,index] = whole8_3[i,index] + 1
      }
    }
  }
  print(i)
}
```

```{r}
charlie <- charlie[-1,]
ids <- unique(tolower(charlie$Code))
ids1 <- unique(tolower(lizzy$kmp.id))
ids <- unique(c(ids, ids1))
```

```{r subset}
whole6_5 <- whole6_4 %>% 
  filter(focal_individual %in% ids)
```

```{r}
dictionary <- dictionary %>% 
  clean_names()
dict <- dictionary %>% 
  filter(replacement!="NA") %>% 
  distinct(focal_individual, groups, replacement)
dic <- dict %>% 
  distinct(focal_individual, groups, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:nrow(whole6_4)) {
  if (grepl("burrow", tolower(part18$focal_individual[i])))
    part18$location[i] = "burrow"
  else if (grepl("forage", tolower(part18$focal_individual[i])))
    part18$location[i] = "forage"
  else if (grepl("Lactation", part18$focal_individual[i]))
    part18$location[i] = "lactation"
}

whole8 <- whole7 %>% 
  mutate(location = as.character(location)) %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(grepl("burrow", focal_individual), "burrow", location)) %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(grepl("forage", focal_individual), "forage", location)) %>% 
  mutate(location = if_else(grepl("lactation", focal_individual), "lactation", location))
         

whole9 <- whole8 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = gsub("burrow |burrow;|burrow; |burrow, |burrow, |burrow:|forage|forage |forage;|forage; |forage: |forage, ", "", focal_individual),
         focal_individual = trim(focal_individual))

dic1 <- dic %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = gsub("burrow |burrow;|burrow; |burrow, |burrow, |burrow:|forage|forage |forage;|forage; |forage: |forage, ", "", focal_individual),
         focal_individual = trim(focal_individual))
```

```{r replace}
dic <- data.frame(lapply(dic, function(v) {
  if (is.character(v)) return(tolower(v))
  else return(v)
}))

individual <- whole9$focal_individual
individual <- individual[!is.na(individual)]
code <- gsub("[\\(\\)]",  "", regmatches(individual, gregexpr("\\([aA-zZ]+[0-9]+\\)", individual)))
codes <- str_extract(individual, "(?<=\\()([^()]*?)(?=\\)[^()]*$)")

for (i in 1:length(codes)) {
  char <- str_extract(codes[i], "[a-z]+")
  if (substr(char,1,1) != "v" || 
      !substr(char,nchar(char), nchar(char)) %in% c("f","m") || 
      nchar(codes[i])-nchar(char)!=3) {
    codes[i] = NA
  }
}
Codes = paste(unique(codes), collapse="|")

individualp <- partner17$partner
codep <- gsub("[\\(\\)]",  "", regmatches(individualp, gregexpr("\\([aA-zZ]+[0-9]+\\)", individualp)))
codesp <- str_extract(individualp, "(?<=\\()([^()]*?)(?=\\)[^()]*$)")

for (i in 1:length(codesp)) {
  char <- str_extract(codesp[i], "[a-z]+")
  if (substr(char,1,1) != "v" || 
      !substr(char,nchar(char), nchar(char)) %in% c("f","m") || 
      nchar(codesp[i])-nchar(char)!=3) {
    codesp[i] = NA
  }
}
Codesp = paste(unique(codesp), collapse="|")

whole8 <- merge(x = whole7, y = dic, by=c("focal_individual","groups"), all.x = TRUE)
whole8_1 <- whole8 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(grepl(Codes, focal_individual), str_extract(focal_individual, Codes), focal_individual))
```

```{r insert A.RA}
whole9_1 <- whole9
for (i in 1:(nrow(whole9)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", whole9[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(whole9)) {
      if (grepl("start focal", whole9[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      if (!is.na(whole9[j,]$A.RA)) {
        whole9[i,]$A.RA = str_c(whole9[i,]$A.RA, whole9[j,]$A.RA, sep = ";")
      }
    }
  }
  print(i)
}

for (i in 1:(nrow(whole9)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", whole9[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(whole9)) {
      if (grepl("start focal", whole9[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      if (!is.na(whole9[j,]$A.RA)) {
        whole9[i,]$A.RA = whole9[j,]$A.RA
        break
      }
    }
  }
  print(i)
}

whole9 <- whole9 %>% 
  mutate(A.RA = if_else(grepl('receive', A.RA), 'receive approach', A.RA))
```

```{r add success}
for (i in 1:(nrow(whole9)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", whole9[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(whole9)) {
      if (grepl("start focal", whole9[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      if (!is.na(whole9[j,]$modifiers) & whole9[j,]$modifiers == 'success') {
        whole9[i,]$modifiers = 'success'
      }
    }
  }
  print(i)
}
```

```{r sub}
whole10 <- whole9 %>% 
  filter(behavior_category=='start focal')
dic1 <- unique(dic1)
whole11 <- merge(x = whole10, y = dic1, by=c("focal_individual","groups"), all.x = TRUE)
whole12 <- whole11 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(grepl(Codes, focal_individual), str_extract(focal_individual, Codes), focal_individual))
whole12_1 <- whole12 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(!is.na(replacement), replacement, focal_individual))  

whole13 <- whole12_1 %>% 
  filter(focal_individual %in% ids)
whole14 <- whole13 %>%
  select(-replacement)

new_subset3 <- new_subset2 %>%
  mutate(behavior_category = location) %>%
  select(-c(replacement, location)) %>%
  rename(location = behavior_category)
debug_subset3 <- debug_subset2 %>%
  mutate(behavior_category = location) %>%
  select(-c(replacement, location)) %>%
  rename(location = behavior_category)
```

```{r round}
subset4[,218:224] <- lapply(subset4[,218:224], FUN = function(x) round(x, 5))
all4[,218:224] <- lapply(all4[,218:224], FUN = function(x) round(x, 5))
```

```{r na to 0}
subset5 <- subset4 
new_subset4 <- new_subset3 
debug_subset4 <- debug_subset3
subset4[,10:224] <- lapply(subset4[,10:224], FUN = function(x) ifelse(is.na(x), 0, x))
new_subset4[,13:232] <- lapply(new_subset4[,13:232], FUN = function(x) ifelse(is.na(x), 0, x))
subset5 <- subset4 %>% 
  mutate(Emergence = if_else(Emergence < 0, NA, Emergence),
         `First Forage` = if_else(`First Forage` < 0, NA, `First Forage`))
new_subset5 <- new_subset4 %>% 
  mutate(Emergence = if_else(Emergence < 0, NA, Emergence),
         `First Forage` = if_else(`First Forage` < 0, NA, `First Forage`))
debug_subset5 <- debug_subset4 %>% 
  mutate(Emergence = if_else(Emergence < 0, NA, Emergence),
         `First Forage` = if_else(`First Forage` < 0, NA, `First Forage`))
write_csv(subset, 'data/subset.csv')
write_csv(new_subset5, 'data/new_subset5.csv')
all5 <- all4 
all4[,10:224] <- lapply(all4[,10:224], FUN = function(x) ifelse(is.na(x), 0, x))
all5 <- all4 %>% 
  mutate(Emergence = if_else(Emergence < 0, NA, Emergence),
         `First Forage` = if_else(`First Forage` < 0, NA, `First Forage`))
write_csv(all5, 'data/all.csv')
```

```{r ampm}
subset5$am.pm <- NA
subset6 <- subset5 %>% 
  mutate(am.pm = if_else(as_hms(St.Time) < as_hms("12:00:00"), "am", "pm"))

all5$am.pm <- NA
all6 <- all5 %>% 
  mutate(am.pm = if_else(as_hms(St.Time) < as_hms("12:00:00"), "am", "pm"))

new_subset5$am.pm <- NA
new_subset6 <- new_subset5 %>% 
  mutate(am.pm = if_else(as_hms(St.Time) < as_hms("12:00:00"), "am", "pm"))
debug_subset5$am.pm <- NA
debug_subset6 <- debug_subset5 %>% 
  mutate(am.pm = if_else(as_hms(St.Time) < as_hms("12:00:00"), "am", "pm"))
```

```{r sex}
subset7 <- subset6 %>% 
  mutate(sex = case_when(str_sub(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+")), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"))) == 'f' ~ 'f',
                         str_sub(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+")), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"))) == 'm' ~ 'm',
                         TRUE ~ 'u'))

new_subset7 <- new_subset6 %>% 
  mutate(sex = case_when(str_sub(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+")), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"))) == 'f' ~ 'f',
                         str_sub(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+")), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"))) == 'm' ~ 'm',
                         TRUE ~ 'u'))
debug_subset7 <- debug_subset6 %>% 
  mutate(sex = case_when(str_sub(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+")), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"))) == 'f' ~ 'f',
                         str_sub(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+")), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"))) == 'm' ~ 'm',
                         TRUE ~ 'u'))

partner19 <- new_p2 %>% 
  mutate(sex = case_when(str_sub(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+")), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"))) == 'f' ~ 'f',
                         str_sub(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+")), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"))) == 'm' ~ 'm',
                         TRUE ~ 'u')) |> 
  arrange(focal_id, event_id)

all7 <- all6 %>% 
  mutate(sex = case_when(str_sub(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+")), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"))) == 'f' ~ 'f',
                         str_sub(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+")), nchar(str_extract(kmp.id, "[aA-zZ]+"))) == 'm' ~ 'm',
                         TRUE ~ 'u'))
```

```{r age}
subset8 <- subset7 %>% 
  mutate(age = as.numeric(as.Date(date)-as.Date(Birthday)))
subset8 <- subset8 %>% 
  mutate(formatted_age = interval(as.Date(Birthday), as.Date(date))) %>% 
  mutate(formatted_age = paste(formatted_age %/% years(1), "years", formatted_age %/% months(1) - 12 * formatted_age %/% years(1), "months", formatted_age %/% days(1) %% 30, "days", sep = ' '))

subset8 <- subset8 %>% 
  mutate(formatted_age = if_else(formatted_age == '0 years 0 months 0 days', '0 years 0 months 30 days', formatted_age))
subset8 <- subset8 %>% 
  rename(age.days = age)

new_subset8 <- new_subset7 %>% 
  mutate(age = as.numeric(as.Date(date)-as.Date(Birthday)))
new_subset8 <- new_subset8 %>% 
  mutate(formatted_age = interval(as.Date(Birthday), as.Date(date))) %>% 
  mutate(formatted_age = paste(formatted_age %/% years(1), "years", formatted_age %/% months(1) - 12 * formatted_age %/% years(1), "months", formatted_age %/% days(1) %% 30, "days", sep = ' '))

debug_subset8 <- debug_subset7 %>% 
  mutate(age = as.numeric(as.Date(date)-as.Date(Birthday)))
debug_subset8 <- debug_subset8 %>% 
  mutate(formatted_age = interval(as.Date(Birthday), as.Date(date))) %>% 
  mutate(formatted_age = paste(formatted_age %/% years(1), "years", formatted_age %/% months(1) - 12 * formatted_age %/% years(1), "months", formatted_age %/% days(1) %% 30, "days", sep = ' '))


partner20 <- partner19 %>% 
  mutate(age = as.numeric(as.Date(date)-as.Date(Birthday)))
partner20 <- partner20 %>% 
  mutate(formatted_age = interval(as.Date(Birthday), as.Date(date))) %>% 
  mutate(formatted_age = paste(formatted_age %/% years(1), "years", formatted_age %/% months(1) - 12 * formatted_age %/% years(1), "months", formatted_age %/% days(1) %% 30, "days", sep = ' '))

subset8 <- subset8 %>% 
  mutate(formatted_age = if_else(formatted_age == '0 years 0 months 0 days', '0 years 0 months 30 days', formatted_age))
subset8 <- subset8 %>% 
  rename(age.days = age)

all8 <- all7 %>% 
  mutate(age = as.numeric(as.Date(date)-as.Date(Birthday)))
all8 <- all8 %>% 
  mutate(formatted_age = interval(as.Date(Birthday), as.Date(date))) %>% 
  mutate(formatted_age = paste(formatted_age %/% years(1), "years", formatted_age %/% months(1) - 12 * formatted_age %/% years(1), "months", formatted_age %/% days(1) %% 30, "days", sep = ' '))

all8 <- all8 %>% 
  mutate(formatted_age = if_else(formatted_age == '0 years 0 months 0 days', '0 years 0 months 30 days', formatted_age))
all8 <- all8 %>% 
  rename(age.days = age)
```

```{r birthday_sitter}
birthdays_sitter <- birthdays_sitter %>% 
  mutate(Code = tolower(Code)) %>% 
  rename(kmp.id = Code, birthday = Birthday) %>% 
  select(-c(...1, Emergence.1, First.Forage.1, First.Move.1, Comments, X))

sub9 <- merge(x = subset8, y = birthdays_sitter, by="kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)

sub9 <- sub9 %>% 
  select(where(no_na))

sub9 <- sub9 %>% 
  select(-Sex)

new_subset9 <- merge(x = new_subset8, y = birthdays_sitter, by="kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)
new_subset9 <- new_subset9 %>% 
  select(where(no_na))
new_subset9 <- new_subset9 %>% 
  select(-Sex)

debug_subset9 <- merge(x = debug_subset8, y = birthdays_sitter, by="kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)
debug_subset9 <- debug_subset9 %>% 
  select(where(no_na))
debug_subset9 <- debug_subset9 %>% 
  select(-Sex)

partner21 <- merge(x = partner20, y = birthdays_sitter, by="kmp.id", all.x = TRUE)

partner21 <- partner21 %>% 
  select(where(no_na)) |> 
  arrange(focal_id, event_id)
  

partner21 <- partner21 %>% 
  select(-Sex)

all9 <- merge(x = all8, y = birthdays_sitter, by="kmp.id", all.x = TRUE, allow.cartesian=TRUE)

all9 <- all9 %>% 
  select(where(no_na))

all9 <- all9 %>% 
  select(-Sex)
```

```{r group_size}
pups_sitters <- pups_sitters_available[-1]
pups_sitters <- pups_sitters %>% 
  rename(date = date1)

diary <- Diary_of_Group_visits_NEW %>% 
  select(GroupName, GroupAbbrev, VisitDate, MemberCount)
gmatch <- Diary_of_Group_visits_NEW %>% 
  select(GroupName, GroupAbbrev)
diary <- diary %>% 
  rename(group.abbrev = GroupAbbrev, groups = GroupName, date = VisitDate)
gmatch <- gmatch %>% 
  rename(group.abbrev = GroupAbbrev, groups = GroupName)
pups_merge <- merge(x = pups_sitters, y = gmatch, by="group.abbrev", all.x = TRUE)
pups_merge <- pups_merge %>% 
  unique()
pups_merge <- pups_merge[-1]
pups_merge <- pups_merge %>% 
  mutate(groups = tolower(groups),
         date = as.character((date)))

sub9 <- sub9 %>% 
  mutate(groups = case_when(grepl("army", groups) ~ "friks army",
                            grepl("freakin", groups) ~ "freaking awesome",
                            TRUE ~ groups)) %>% 
  unique()

new_subset9 <- new_subset9 %>% 
  mutate(groups = case_when(grepl("army", groups) ~ "friks army",
                            grepl("freakin", groups) ~ "freaking awesome",
                            TRUE ~ groups)) %>% 
  unique()

debug_subset9 <- debug_subset9 %>% 
  mutate(groups = case_when(grepl("army", groups) ~ "friks army",
                            grepl("freakin", groups) ~ "freaking awesome",
                            TRUE ~ groups)) %>% 
  unique()

partner22 <- partner21 %>% 
  mutate(groups = case_when(grepl("army", groups) ~ "friks army",
                            grepl("freakin", groups) ~ "freaking awesome",
                            TRUE ~ groups)) %>% 
  unique()

all9 <- all9 %>% 
  mutate(groups = case_when(grepl("army", groups) ~ "friks army",
                            grepl("freakin", groups) ~ "freaking awesome",
                            TRUE ~ groups)) %>% 
  unique()

diary <- diary[1:3]
diary <- diary %>% 
  rename(groups = Group)

pups_merge1 <- pups_merge[,c(1,2,4)]
names(pups_merge1) <- c("Date", "MemberCount", "groups")
pups_merge1 <- pups_merge1[,c(3,1,2)]

diary <- diary %>% 
  mutate(Date = as.Date(date)) |> 
  select(-c(group.abbrev, date))
diary <- diary %>% 
  mutate(MemberCount = as.numeric(MemberCount))
size <- bind_rows(diary, pups_merge1) |> unique()
size <- size |> 
  mutate(groups = tolower(groups))
new_subet9 <- new_subset9 |> 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))
debug_subset9 <- debug_subset9 |> 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))
partner22 <- partner22 |> 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))
sub10 <- merge(x = sub9, y = diary, by=c("groups"), all.x = TRUE, allow.cartesian=TRUE)

partner22_1 <- partner22 |> 
  select(groups, date)
write_xlsx(partner22, 'data/partner22.xlsx')
#10.3 (dowload size and the dataset to process in sql)
new_subset10 <- merge(x = new_subset9, y = size, by="groups", all.x = TRUE, allow.cartesian=TRUE)
partner23 <- merge(x = partner22_1, y = size, by="groups", all.x = TRUE, allow.cartesian=TRUE)
d1 <- left_join(x = d[1:10,], y = pups_merge, by = "groups")
sub10 <- sub10 %>% 
  mutate(dif_date = abs(as.numeric(as.Date(date)-as.Date(Date))))
new_subset10 <- new_subset9 |> 
  mutate(date = as.POSIXct(date))
new_subset10 <- new_subset10 %>% 
  mutate(dif_date = abs(as.numeric(as.Date(date)-as.Date(Date))))

d1 <- d1 %>% 
  mutate(dif_date = abs(as.numeric(as.Date(date.x)-as.Date(date.y))))
partner23 <- partner23 |> 
  mutate(date = as.POSIXct(date))
partner23 <- partner23 %>% 
  mutate(dif_date = abs(as.numeric(as.Date(date)-as.Date(Date))))
sub11 <- sub10 %>% 
  group_by(groups, date) %>% 
  slice_min(order_by = dif_date)
new_subset11 <- new_subset10 %>% 
  group_by(groups, date) %>% 
  slice_min(order_by = dif_date) 
#new_subset11 <- new_subset11 |> 
new_subset11 <- new_subset10 |> 
  unique()
partner24 <- partner23 %>% 
  group_by(groups, date) %>% 
  slice_min(order_by = dif_date) 
d1 <- d1 %>% 
  group_by(groups, date.x) %>% 
  slice_min(order_by = dif_date) 

t <- sub11 %>% 
  select(date, MemberCount, Date, dif_date, kmp.id, groups, St.Time)

sub12 <- merge(x = sub9, y = t, by=c("kmp.id", "date", "St.Time", "groups"), all.x = TRUE)

sub13 <- sub12 %>% 
  distinct(kmp.id, date, St.Time, groups, observer, dif_date, .keep_all = TRUE)

all10 <- merge(x = all9, y = diary, by=c("groups"), all.x = TRUE, allow.cartesian=TRUE)

all10_1 <- all10 %>% 
  mutate(date = na_if(date == 'NaN', date))
all10 <- all10_1 %>% 
  mutate(dif_date = abs(as.numeric(as.Date(date)-as.Date(Date))))

all11 <- all10 %>% 
  group_by(groups, date) %>% 
  slice_min(order_by = dif_date)

tt <- all11 %>% 
  select(date, MemberCount, Date, dif_date, kmp.id, groups, St.Time)

all12 <- merge(x = all9, y = tt, by=c("kmp.id", "date", "St.Time", "groups"), all.x = TRUE)

all13 <- all12 %>% 
  distinct(kmp.id, date, St.Time, groups, observer, dif_date, .keep_all = TRUE)

size <- new_subset16 |> 
  select(groups, date, MemberCount) |> 
  unique()

partner24 <- partner23 |> 
  mutate(date = as.character(date)) |> 
  left_join(size, by = c('groups', 'date')) |> 
  unique()
```

```{r sql}
library(odbc)
library(DBI)
data("new_subset10")
data("diary1")
con <- dbConnect(drv = RSQLite::SQLite(),
                 dbname = ":memory:")
tbl(src = con, "diary1")
#store sample data in database
dbWriteTable(conn = con, 
             name = "new_subset10",
             value = new_subset10)
dbWriteTable(conn = con, 
             name = "diary1",
             value = diary1)
```

```{r}
new_subset10 <- new_subset9 |> 
  select(-Birthday) |> 
  rename(Litter1 = Litter) |> 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))
partner23 <- partner22 |> 
  select(-Birthday) |> 
  rename(Litter1 = Litter) |> 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))
write_csv(partner23, 'data/partner23.csv')
write_xlsx(partner23, 'data/partner23.xlsx')
diary1 <- diary |> 
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))
library(sqldf)
new_subset10 <- sqldf('select * from new_subset10 left join diary using (groups) where abs(datediff(new_subset10.date,diary.Date)) <= 17')
#new_subset10 <- merge(x = new_subset9, y = pups_merge1, by=c("groups"), all.x = TRUE, allow.cartesian=TRUE)
partner24 <- sqldf('select * from partner23 left join diary using (groups) where abs(datediff(new_subset10.date,diary.Date)) <= 17')
query <- "select * from new_subset10 left join diary1 using (groups) where abs(partner23.date-diary1.Date) <= 17"
new_subset11 <- DBI::dbGetQuery(conn = con, statement = query)
new_subset11 <- new_subset11 %>% 
  mutate(dif_date = abs(as.numeric(as.Date(date)-as.Date(Date))))
partner25 <- DBI::dbGetQuery(conn = con, statement = query)
new_subset11 <- new_subset11 %>% 
  mutate(dif_date = abs(as.numeric(as.Date(date)-as.Date(Date))))

new_subset12 <- new_subset11 %>% 
  group_by(groups, date) %>% 
  slice_min(order_by = dif_date)
whole2 <- whole1 %>% 
  group_by(groups, date) %>% 
  slice_min(order_by = date_dif)

new_t <- new_subset11 %>% 
  select(date, MemberCount, Date, dif_date, kmp.id, groups, St.Time) |> 
  unique()
new_t <- whole2 %>% 
  select(date, MemberCount, Date, date_dif, kmp.id, groups, St.Time) |> 
  unique()
new_subset13 <- merge(x = new_subset9, y = new_t |> mutate(date = as.character(date)), by=c("kmp.id", "date", "St.Time", "groups"), all.x = TRUE) |> unique()
debug_subset13 <- merge(x = debug_subset9, y = new_t |> mutate(date = as.character(date)), by=c("kmp.id", "date", "St.Time", "groups"), all.x = TRUE) |> unique()

new_subset14 <- new_subset13 %>% 
  distinct(kmp.id, date, St.Time, groups, observer, date_dif, .keep_all = TRUE)
debug_subset14 <- debug_subset13 %>% 
  distinct(kmp.id, date, St.Time, groups, observer, date_dif, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

```{r}
t2 <- sub13 %>% 
  filter(dif_date > 15) %>% 
  select(date, Date, groups, dif_date)
```

```{r}
t3 <- pups_merge%>% 
  filter(groups == "van helsing")
t4 <- Diary_of_Group_visits_NEW%>% 
  filter(tolower(GroupName) == "van helsing")
```

```{r write}
write_csv(new_subset14, 'data/revised_subset.csv')
write_csv(debug_subset14, 'data/debug_subset14.csv')
write_xlsx(new_subset14, 'data/revised_subset.xlsx')
```

```{r additional}
new_subset15 <- new_subset14 |> 
#new_subset15 <- new_subset11 |> 
  mutate(percent_hour_focal = focal_length / 3600)
new_subset15 <- new_subset15 |> 
  rename(End.Time = end) |> 
  select(kmp.id, date, St.Time, End.Time, focal_length, percent_hour_focal, everything())
new_subset15 <- new_subset15 |> 
  rename(VisitDate = Date) |> 
  select(-date_dif)

debug_subset15 <- debug_subset14 |> 
#new_subset15 <- new_subset11 |> 
  mutate(percent_hour_focal = focal_length / 3600)
debug_subset15 <- debug_subset15 |> 
  rename(End.Time = end) |> 
  select(kmp.id, date, St.Time, End.Time, focal_length, percent_hour_focal, everything())
debug_subset15 <- debug_subset15 |> 
  rename(VisitDate = Date) |> 
  select(-date_dif)

write_xlsx(new_subset17, 'data/revised_whole.xlsx')
write_csv(new_subset17, 'data/revised_subset.csv')
write_csv(new_subset17, 'data/revised_whole.csv')
write_csv(size, 'data/size.csv')

mmod <- mod1 |> 
  rename(kmp.id = focal_individual)
mmod1 <- mmod |> 
  mutate(St.Time = as_hms(St.Time)) |> 
  select(-groups) |> 
  rename(mod = modifiers)
new_subset16 <- left_join(new_subset15 |> mutate(date = as.character(date)), mmod1, by = c('date', 'St.Time', 'kmp.id'))

new_subset16 <- new_subset16 |> 
  mutate(modifiers = mod) |> 
  select(-mod)

debug_subset16 <- left_join(debug_subset15 |> mutate(date = as.character(date)), mmod1, by = c('date', 'St.Time', 'kmp.id'))

debug_subset16 <- debug_subset16 |> 
  mutate(modifiers = mod) |> 
  select(-mod)
```


```{r order}
sub_sub1 <- sub13[,1:8]
sub_sub2 <- sub13[,-(1:8)]
sub_sub2_1 <- sub_sub2[, grepl("dig|ga|gt|groom|huddle|pred. alarm|crash|in burr|out of view" , colnames(sub_sub2)), with = FALSE]
sub_sub2_1 <- sub_sub2_1[,1:33]

sub_sub2_2 <- sub_sub2[, !(names(sub_sub2) %in% names(sub_sub2_1)), with = FALSE]
sub_sub2_2_1 <- sub_sub2_2[, 1:181]

sub_sub2_2_1 <- sub_sub2_2_1 %>% 
  select(order(colnames(sub_sub2_2_1)))

sub_sub2_2_2 <- sub_sub2_2[, 183:ncol(sub_sub2_2)]
sub_sub2_2_2 <- sub_sub2_2_2[,1:39]
sub_sub2_2_2 <- sub_sub2_2_2 %>% 
  clean_names()
sub_sub2_2_2 <- data.frame(lapply(sub_sub2_2_2, function(v) {
  if (is.character(v)) 
    return(tolower(v))
  else 
    return(v)
}))

subset <- bind_cols(sub_sub1, sub_sub2_1, sub_sub2_2_1, sub_sub2_2_2)
subset <- subset %>% 
  rename(group_size = member_count)
```

```{r add focal end}
part6 <- part5 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = str_extract(focal_individual, "(?<=\\()([^()]*?)(?=\\)[^()]*$)"))
part6 <- part6[!duplicated(part5[ , c("date", "St.Time", "focal_individual")]),]    
part7 <- part6 %>% 
  select(date, St.Time, focal_individual, groups, observer, End.Time)
names(part7)[names(part7) == "focal_individual"] <- "kmp.id"

part7 <- part7 %>% 
  mutate(groups = case_when(grepl("army", groups) ~ "friks army",
                            grepl("freakin", groups) ~ "freaking awesome",
                            TRUE ~ groups))
subset_new <- merge(x = new_subset, y = part7, by = c("date", "observer", "groups", "St.Time", "kmp.id"), all.x = TRUE)
```

```{r meta for partner}
meta <- new_subset16[names(new_subset16) %in% c(names(new_subset16[218:257]), names(new_subset16[1:2]))]
meta1 <- meta |> 
  select(-am.pm) |> 
  rename(focal_individual = kmp.id) |> 
  unique()
partner19 <- partner18 |> left_join(meta1, by = c('focal_individual', 'date'))
```

```{r d.}
nrow(partner23 |> filter(behavior_duration != 0))
```
```{r}
new_subset17 <- new_subset16 |> 
  mutate(i.fc = i.fc + i.fc.lose + `i.fc.unclear winner` + i.fc.win,
         r.fc = r.fc + r.fc.win + `r.fc.unclear winner` + r.fc.lose)
debug_subset17 <- debug_subset16 |> 
  mutate(i.fc = i.fc + i.fc.lose + `i.fc.unclear winner` + i.fc.win,
         r.fc = r.fc + r.fc.win + `r.fc.unclear winner` + r.fc.lose)
```

```{r}
partner24 <- partner23 |> 
  mutate(behavior_duration = if_else(behavior_duration == 0, NA, behavior_duration))
partner25 <- partner24 |> 
  rename(focal_individual = kmp.id) |> 
  arrange(focal_id, event_id)
partner26 <- partner25 |> 
  mutate(formatted_age = if_else(grepl('NA', formatted_age), NA, formatted_age))
write_csv(partner31, 'data/social.csv')
write_xlsx(partner31, 'data/social.xlsx')
save(partner31, file = 'data/social.RData')
saveRDS(partner31, file = "data/social.rds") 
p <- read_rds("data/social.rds")
```

```{r}
length <- new_subset17 |> 
  rename(focal_individual = kmp.id, observation_start = St.Time, observation_end = End.Time) |> 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) |> 
  select(focal_individual, date, observation_start, observation_end, groups, focal_length)
partner27 <- partner26 |> 
  left_join(length, by = c('focal_individual', 'date', 'observation_start', 'groups', 'observation_end')) |> 
  unique()
partner28 <- partner27 |> 
  mutate(observation_duration = focal_length,
         observation_duration_frac_hour = observation_duration / 3600) |> 
  select(-focal_length)
```

```{r}
part_rep <- partner_replacement |> 
  mutate_all(tolower)
```

```{r}
whole1 <- d |> 
  select(-index...1, index...257)

```

```{r}
names(part_rep) <- tolower(names(part_rep))
partner29 <- partner28 |> 
  mutate(date = as.character(date)) |> 
  left_join(part_rep, by = c('date', 'partner', 'groups')) |> 
  unique()
partner30 <- partner29 |> 
  mutate(partner = if_else(partner != replacement & !is.na(replacement), replacement, partner)) |> 
  unique()
```

```{r}
partner31 <- partner30 |> 
  mutate(is_pup_centric = if_else(focal_individual %in% ids, 1, 0))
```


```{r}
# debug and revise, 2025
# trouble-shoot in burr/bh
rct <- new_whole6 |> 
  select(date, St.Time, end, groups, observer, `out of view`, `out of view_count`, `in burr/bh`, `in burr/bh_count`, focal_individual)
rct1 <- rct |> 
  filter(if_any(c(`out of view`, `out of view_count`, `in burr/bh`, `in burr/bh_count`), ~. > 0))
rct2 <- rct1 |> 
  filter(`out of view` == 0 & `out of view_count` != 0 | `out of view` != 0 & `out of view_count` == 0)

# oov & in bur duration not calculated correctly due to a lacking of end time
```

```{r}
rct_5 <- new_whole6 |> 
  filter(`out of view` == 0 & `out of view_count` != 0 | `out of view` != 0 & `out of view_count` == 0)
rct_5 |> 
  select(date, St.Time, groups, observer, `out of view`, `out of view_count`)

# out of view on the last row of a focal and lack an end time and the focal has no end time, their durations are 0 but their frequencies are nonzero. (3.12 ask caroline? - treat as 1 sec or 0 sec) (for GA/Dig, use 1 sec for those with no focal end)

rct_6 <- part2_8 |> 
  select(date, St.Time, End.Time, S.Duration, groups, observer, behavior_category, focal_individual)
rrc <- rct_6[1:10000,]
```

```{r}
# recalc durations of oov/bur
# treat as 1 sec if no end and at the end of a focal without focal end
par2_8_arc <- par2_8
part2_8_arc <- part2_8
for (i in 1:(nrow(part2_8)-1)) {
  if (grepl(Inter, part2_8$behavior_category[i]) & 
      !grepl("end", part2_8$behavior_category[i])) {
    s = str_extract(part2_8$behavior_category[i], Inter)
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(part2_8)) {
      if ((grepl(s, part2_8$behavior_category[j]) &
        grepl("end", part2_8$behavior_category[j])) |
        (grepl(Patter_inter, part2_8$behavior_category[j]) &
         !grepl("end", part2_8$behavior_category[j])) |
        grepl("focal", part2_8$behavior_category[j]) |
        part2_8$date[i] != part2_8$date[j] |
        part2_8$observer[i] != part2_8$observer[j] |
        part2_8$groups[i] != part2_8$groups[j]) {
          break
      }
    } 
    if (part2_8$date[i] == part2_8$date[j] &
        part2_8$observer[i] == part2_8$observer[j] &
        part2_8$groups[i] == part2_8$groups[j] & part2_8$behavior_category[j] != 'start focal') {
      part2_8$End.Time[i] = part2_8$St.Time[j]
    }
    else if (part2_8$behavior_category[j] == 'start focal') {
      part2_8$End.Time[i] = part2_8$St.Time[i] + 1
    }
    else {
      part2_8$End.Time[i] = part2_8$St.Time[j-1]
    }
  }
  print(i)
}


for (i in 1:(nrow(par2_8)-1)) {
  if (grepl(Inter, par2_8$behavior_category[i]) & 
      !grepl("end", par2_8$behavior_category[i])) {
    s = str_extract(par2_8$behavior_category[i], Inter)
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(par2_8)) {
      if ((grepl(s, par2_8$behavior_category[j]) &
        grepl("end", par2_8$behavior_category[j])) |
        (grepl(Patter_inter, par2_8$behavior_category[j]) &
         !grepl("end", par2_8$behavior_category[j])) |
        grepl("focal", par2_8$behavior_category[j]) |
        par2_8$file[i] != par2_8$file[j] |
        par2_8$sheet[i] != par2_8$sheet[j]) {
          break
      }
    } 
    if (par2_8$file[i] == par2_8$file[j] &
        par2_8$sheet[i] == par2_8$sheet[j] & par2_8$behavior_category[j] != 'start focal') {
      par2_8$End.Time[i] = par2_8$St.Time[j]
    }
    else if (par2_8$behavior_category[j] == 'start focal') {
      par2_8$End.Time[i] = par2_8$St.Time[i] + 1
    }
    else {
      par2_8$End.Time[i] = par2_8$St.Time[j-1]
    }
  }
  print(i)
}

rr <- rct_whole |> 
  filter(as.character(as.Date(date)) == '2012-02-21')
```

```{r}
# revise end time of oov/in bur to t+1s if it's now equal to the start time of next focal
rct_whole <- new_whole4
for (i in 1:(nrow(rct_whole)-1)) {
  if (rct_whole[i,]$behavior_category == 'in burr/bh' | rct_whole[i,]$behavior_category == 'out of view') {
    for (j in i+1:nrow(rct_whole)) {
      if (rct_whole[j,]$behavior_category == 'start focal') {
        break
      }
    }
    if (rct_whole[i,]$St.Time + rct_whole[i,]$S.Duration == rct_whole[j,]$St.Time) {
      rct_whole[i,]$S.Duration = 1
    }
  }
  print(i)
}
```

```{r}
# recalc oov & in bur duration
rct_whole$revised_oov <- 0
rct_whole$revised_oov_count <- 0
rct_whole$revised_inbur <- 0
rct_whole$revised_inbur_count <- 0
rct_whole_arc <- rct_whole
for (i in 1:(nrow(rct_whole)-1)) {
  if (grepl("start focal", rct_whole[i,]$behavior_category)) {
    for (j in (i+1):nrow(rct_whole)) {
      if (grepl("start focal", rct_whole[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        break
      }
      if (grepl('out ', rct_whole[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        rct_whole[i,]$revised_oov = rct_whole[i,]$revised_oov + rct_whole[j,]$S.Duration
        rct_whole[i,]$revised_oov_count = rct_whole[i,]$revised_oov_count + 1
      } else if (grepl('in b', rct_whole[j,]$behavior_category)) {
        rct_whole[i,]$revised_inbur = rct_whole[i,]$revised_inbur + rct_whole[j,]$S.Duration
        rct_whole[i,]$revised_inbur_count = rct_whole[i,]$revised_inbur_count + 1
      }
    }
  }
  print(i)
}
```
```{r}
# find instances where focal length < oov or in bur
rr <- rct_whole |> 
  filter(revised_oov > focal_length | revised_inbur > focal_length)
diag <- rct_whole |> 
  filter(date == '2014-08-05', behavior_category == 'start focal')
# 2014-05-30 09:49:43 - 10:12:04
# 2014-05-30 10:10:13 - 10:40:50
# 2014-08-30 09:29:58 - 09:51:47
```

```{r}
# integrate and replace the old
rct_whole1 <- rct_whole |> 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(grepl(Codes, focal_individual), str_extract(focal_individual, Codes), focal_individual))
# merge by date, St.Time, observer, groups (but seems has 1 duplicate)
# 2013-06-29 09:14:55 charli lazuli has two kmp.id (resolved below)
diag2 <- new_subset17 |> 
  filter(date == '2013-06-29', St.Time == hms('09:14:55'), observer == 'charli', groups == 'lazuli')
# to deal with this, add a new col as indicator
# correct the two rows in new_subset17 first
new_subset18 <- new_subset17
debug_subset18 <- debug_subset17

# manually correct some original data record errors
which(new_subset18$kmp.id == 'vlf194' & new_subset18$date == '2013-06-29' & new_subset18$St.Time == hms('09:14:55'))
new_subset18[10564,]$End.Time = as_hms('9:24:51')
new_subset18[10564,]$`near. neigh.` = 4
new_subset18[10564,]$huddle = 18
new_subset18[10564,]$huddle_count = 1
new_subset18[10564,]$groom = 5
new_subset18[10564,]$groom_count = 1
new_subset18[17414,]$End.Time = as_hms('19:39:43')
```
