```{r}
which(new_subset18$kmp.id == 'vwm163' & new_subset18$date == '2011-12-16' & new_subset18$St.Time == as_hms('18:19:07'))
new_subset18[11574,]$St.Time = as_hms('09:24:55')
new_subset18[11574,]$groom_count = 1
new_subset18[11574,]$groom = 13
new_subset18[11574,]$huddle_count = 0
new_subset18[11574,]$`near. neigh.` = 2
new_subset18[11574,]$End.Time = as_hms('9:30:48')

debug_subset18[10564,]$End.Time = as_hms('9:24:51')
debug_subset18[10564,]$`near. neigh.` = 4
debug_subset18[10564,]$huddle = 18
debug_subset18[10564,]$huddle_count = 1
debug_subset18[10564,]$groom = 5
debug_subset18[10564,]$groom_count = 1
debug_subset18[17414,]$End.Time = as_hms('19:39:43')
which(debug_subset18$kmp.id == 'vwm163' & debug_subset18$date == '2011-12-16' & debug_subset18$St.Time == as_hms('18:19:07'))
debug_subset18[11574,]$St.Time = as_hms('09:24:55')
debug_subset18[11574,]$groom_count = 1
debug_subset18[11574,]$groom = 13
debug_subset18[11574,]$huddle_count = 0
debug_subset18[11574,]$`near. neigh.` = 2
debug_subset18[11574,]$End.Time = as_hms('9:30:48')

# merge
rct_whole1 <- merge(x = rct_whole, y = dic, by=c("focal_individual","groups"), all.x = TRUE)
rct_whole2 <- rct_whole1 %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(grepl(Codes, focal_individual), str_extract(focal_individual, Codes), focal_individual))
rct_whole3 <- rct_whole2 %>%
  filter(behavior_category == 'start focal') %>% 
  mutate(focal_individual = if_else(focal_individual!=replacement, replacement, focal_individual))
rct_whole3 <- rct_whole3 |> 
  rename(kmp.id = focal_individual)
rct_whole3 <- unique(rct_whole3)

which(rct_whole3$kmp.id == 'vlm193' & rct_whole3$date == '2013-06-29' & rct_whole3$St.Time == as_hms('09:14:55'))
rct_whole3[3761,]$St.Time <- NA
rct_whole3[3761,]$groups <- NA

rct_whole3[3852,]$end = as_hms('19:39:43')

rct_whole3[3798,]$St.Time <- NA
rct_whole3[3798,]$groups <- NA

rct_whole3[3866,]$revised_oov = 213
rct_whole3[3866,]$revised_oov_count = 2
rct_whole3[3832,]$St.Time <- NA
rct_whole3[3832,]$groups <- NA

rct_whole3[3984,]$St.Time <- NA
rct_whole3[3984,]$groups <- NA

rct_whole3 <- rct_whole3 |> 
  filter(!(is.na(St.Time) & is.na(groups)))

rct_whole3[3217,]$St.Time = as_hms('09:24:55')
rct_whole3[3217,]$end = as_hms('09:30:48')
```
```{r}
new_subset19 <- merge(x = new_subset18, y = rct_whole3 |> select(date, St.Time, observer, groups, revised_oov, revised_inbur, revised_oov_count, revised_inbur_count), by=c('date', 'St.Time', 'observer', 'groups'), all.x = TRUE)

debug_subset19 <- merge(x = debug_subset18, y = rct_whole3 |> select(date, St.Time, observer, groups, revised_oov, revised_inbur, revised_oov_count, revised_inbur_count), by=c('date', 'St.Time', 'observer', 'groups'), all.x = TRUE)

comp <- new_subset19 |> 
  filter(`out of view` != revised_oov)
comp <- new_subset19 |> 
  filter(`in burr/bh` != revised_inbur) |> 
  select(`in burr/bh`, revised_inbur)
```

```{r}
# delete cols: r.groom
new_subset20 <- new_subset19 |> 
  select(-c(r.groom, `in burr/bh`, `in burr/bh_count`, `out of view`, `out of view_count`))
debug_subset20 <- debug_subset19 |> 
  select(-c(r.groom, `in burr/bh`, `in burr/bh_count`, `out of view`, `out of view_count`))
```

```{r}
# recalc focal lengths and percents
new_subset21 <- new_subset20 |> 
  rename(`out of view` = revised_oov, 
         `in burr/bh` = revised_inbur,
         `out of view_count` = revised_oov_count,
         `in burr/bh_count` = revised_inbur_count)
new_subset21 <- new_subset21 |> 
  mutate(focal_length = End.Time - St.Time)

# oov of 0s
new_subset22 <- new_subset21 |> 
  mutate(`out of view` = if_else(`out of view` == 0 & `out of view_count` != 0, 1, `out of view`))

new_subset23 <- new_subset22 |> 
  mutate(focal_length = as.numeric(focal_length) - `out of view` - `in burr/bh`,
         `percent_out of view` = `out of view`/3600,
         percent_hour_huddle = huddle/3600,
         percent_hour_groom = groom/3600,
         `percent_inbur/bh` = `in burr/bh`/3600,
         percent_focal_dig = dig/focal_length,
         percent_focal_ga = ga/focal_length,
         percent_focal_gt = gt/focal_length,
         percent_focal_renn = renn/focal_length,
         percent_focal_crash = renn/focal_length,
         `percent_focal_out of view` = `out of view`/focal_length,
         `percent_focal_inbur/bh` = `in burr/bh`/focal_length,
         `percent_focal_pred. alarm` = `pred. alarm`/focal_length,
         percent_focal_huddle = huddle/focal_length,
         percent_focal_groom = groom/focal_length)

debug_subset21 <- debug_subset20 |> 
  rename(`out of view` = revised_oov, 
         `in burr/bh` = revised_inbur,
         `out of view_count` = revised_oov_count,
         `in burr/bh_count` = revised_inbur_count)
debug_subset21 <- debug_subset21 |> 
  mutate(focal_length = End.Time - St.Time)

# oov of 0s
debug_subset22 <- debug_subset21 |> 
  mutate(`out of view` = if_else(`out of view` == 0 & `out of view_count` != 0, 1, `out of view`))

debug_subset23 <- debug_subset22 |> 
  mutate(focal_length = as.numeric(focal_length) - `out of view` - `in burr/bh`,
         `percent_out of view` = `out of view`/3600,
         percent_hour_huddle = huddle/3600,
         percent_hour_groom = groom/3600,
         `percent_inbur/bh` = `in burr/bh`/3600,
         percent_focal_dig = dig/focal_length,
         percent_focal_ga = ga/focal_length,
         percent_focal_gt = gt/focal_length,
         percent_focal_renn = renn/focal_length,
         percent_focal_crash = renn/focal_length,
         `percent_focal_out of view` = `out of view`/focal_length,
         `percent_focal_inbur/bh` = `in burr/bh`/focal_length,
         `percent_focal_pred. alarm` = `pred. alarm`/focal_length,
         percent_focal_huddle = huddle/focal_length,
         percent_focal_groom = groom/focal_length)
```

```{r}
# check freq
nrow(new_subset23 |> filter(`in burr/bh` > 0))

write_xlsx(new_subset23, '/Users/xcym/Desktop/Muser/data/revised_subset0317.xlsx')
write_csv(new_subset23, '/Users/xcym/Desktop/Muser/data/revised_subset0317.csv')
write_xlsx(debug_subset23, '/Users/xcym/Desktop/Muser/data/revised_subset0821.xlsx')
write_csv(debug_subset23, '/Users/xcym/Desktop/Muser/data/revised_subset0821.csv')
```

```{r}
debug0721 <- new_whole5 |> 
  filter(date == '2014-12-13' & St.Time >= as_hms('08:59:00') & St.Time <= as_hms('09:18:33'))
debug0725 <- debug_whole5 |> 
  filter(date == '2014-12-13' & St.Time >= as_hms('08:59:00') & St.Time <= as_hms('09:18:33'))
# new_whole2[758067,]
match(new_whole5[444,]$behavior_category, cols)
names(new_whole5[27])

debug0816 <- debug_subset23 |> 
  filter(date == '2014-12-13' & St.Time >= as_hms('08:59:00') & St.Time <= as_hms('09:18:33'))
```
